distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n13:  * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n14:  * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n15:  * limitations under the License.\\n16:  */\\n17: package kafka.security.authorizer\\n18: \\n19: import java.{lang, util}\\n20: import java.util.concurrent.{CompletableFuture, CompletionStage}\\n21: \\n22: import com.typesafe.scalalogging.Logger\\n23: import kafka.api.KAFKA_2_0_IV1\\n24: import kafka.security.authorizer.AclEntry.ResourceSeparator\\n25: import kafka.server.{KafkaConfig, KafkaServer}\\n26: import kafka.utils._\\n27: import kafka.utils.Implicits._\\n28: import kafka.zk._\\n29: import org.apache.kafka.common.Endpoint\\n30: import org.apache.kafka.common.acl._\\n31: import org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation._\\n32: import org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclPermissionType.{ALLOW, DENY}\\n33: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.{ApiException, InvalidRequestException, UnsupportedVersionException}\\n34: import org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiKeys\\n35: import org.apache.kafka.common.resource._\\n36: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.auth.KafkaPrincipal\\n37: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.{SecurityUtils, Time}\\n38: import org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult.AclBindingDeleteResult\\n39: import org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer._\\n40: import org.apache.zookeeper.client.ZKClientConfig\\n41: \\n42: import scala.annotation.nowarn\\n43: import scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer\\n44: import scala.collection.{Seq, immutable, mutable}\\n45: import scala.jdk.CollectionConverters._\\n46: import scala.util.{Failure, Random, Success, Try}\\n47: \\n48: object AclAuthorizer {\\n49:   // Optional override zookeeper cluster configuration where acls will be stored. If not specified,\\n50:   // acls will be stored in the same zookeeper where all other kafka broker metadata is stored.\\n51:   val configPrefix = \\\"authorizer.\\\"\\n52:   val ZkUrlProp = s\\\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.url\\\"\\n53:   val ZkConnectionTimeOutProp = s\\\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms\\\"\\n54:   val ZkSessionTimeOutProp = s\\\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.session.timeout.ms\\\"\\n55:   val ZkMaxInFlightRequests = s\\\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.max.in.flight.requests\\\"\\n56: \\n57:   // Semi-colon separated list of users that will be treated as super users and will have access to all the resources\\n58:   // for all actions from all hosts, defaults to no super users.\\n59:   val SuperUsersProp = \\\"super.users\\\"\\n60:   // If set to true when no acls are found for a resource, authorizer allows access to everyone. Defaults to false.\\n61:   val AllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFoundProp = \\\"allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found\\\"\\n62: \\n63:   case class VersionedAcls(acls: Set[AclEntry], zkVersion: Int) {\\n64:     def exists: Boolean = zkVersion != ZkVersion.UnknownVersion\\n65:   }\\n66: \\n67:   class AclSeqs(seqs: Seq[AclEntry]*) {\\n68:     def find(p: AclEntry => Boolean): Option[AclEntry] = {\\n69:       // Lazily iterate through the inner `Seq` elements and stop as soon as we find a match\\n70:       val it = seqs.iterator.flatMap(_.find(p))\\n71:       if (it.hasNext) Some(it.next())\\n72:       else None\\n73:     }\\n74: \\n75:     def isEmpty: Boolean = !seqs.exists(_.nonEmpty)\\n76:   }\\n77: \\n78:   val NoAcls = VersionedAcls(Set.empty, ZkVersion.UnknownVersion)\\n79:   val WildcardHost = \\\"*\\\"\\n80: \\n81:   // Orders by resource type, then resource pattern type and finally reverse ordering by name.\\n82:   class ResourceOrdering extends Ordering[ResourcePattern] {\\n83: \\n84:     def compare(a: ResourcePattern, b: ResourcePattern): Int = {\\n85:       val rt = a.resourceType.compareTo(b.resourceType)\\n86:       if (rt != 0)\\n87:         rt\\n88:       else {\\n89:         val rnt = a.patternType.compareTo(b.patternType)\\n90:         if (rnt != 0)\\n91:           rnt\\n92:         else\\n93:           (a.name compare b.name) * -1\\n94:       }\\n95:     }\\n96:   }\\n97: \\n98:   private[authorizer] def zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfigAndMap(kafkaConfig: KafkaConfig, configMap: mutable.Map[String, _<:Any]): ZKClientConfig = {\\n99:     val zkSslClientEnable = configMap.get(AclAuthorizer.configPrefix + KafkaConfig.ZkSslClientEnableProp).\\n100:       map(_.toString).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkSslClientEnable.toString).toBoolean\\n101:     if (!zkSslClientEnable)\\n102:       new ZKClientConfig\\n103:     else {\\n104:       // start with the base config from the Kafka configuration\\n105:       // be sure to force creation since the zkSslClientEnable property in the kafkaConfig could be false\\n106:       val zkClientConfig = KafkaServer.zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfig(kafkaConfig, true)\\n107:       // add in any prefixed overlays\\n108:       KafkaConfig.ZkSslConfigToSystemPropertyMap.forKeyValue { (kafkaProp, sysProp) =>\\n109:         configMap.get(AclAuthorizer.configPrefix + kafkaProp).foreach { prefixedValue =>\\n110:           zkClientConfig.setProperty(sysProp,\\n111:             if (kafkaProp == KafkaConfig.ZkSslEndpointIdentificationAlgorithmProp)\\n112:               (prefixedValue.toString.toUpperCase == \\\"HTTPS\\\").toString\\n113:             else\\n114:               prefixedValue.toString)\\n115:         }\\n116:       }\\n117:       zkClientConfig\\n118:     }\\n119:   }\\n120: \\n121:   private def validateAclBinding(aclBinding: AclBinding): Unit = {\\n122:     if (aclBinding.isUnknown)\\n123:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"ACL binding contains unknown elements\\\")\\n124:   }\\n125: }\\n126: \\n127: class AclAuthorizer extends Authorizer with Logging {\\n128:   import kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer._\\n129: \\n130:   private[security] val authorizerLogger = Logger(\\\"kafka.authorizer.logger\\\")\\n131:   private var superUsers = Set.empty[KafkaPrincipal]\\n132:   private var shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound = false\\n133:   private var zkClient: KafkaZkClient = _\\n134:   private var aclChangeListeners: Iterable[AclChangeSubscription] = Iterable.empty\\n135:   private var extendedAclSupport: Boolean = _\\n136: \\n137:   @volatile\\n138:   private var aclCache = new scala.collection.immutable.TreeMap[ResourcePattern, VersionedAcls]()(new ResourceOrdering)\\n139: \\n140:   @volatile\\n141:   private var resourceCache = new scala.collection.immutable.HashMap[ResourceTypeKey,\\n142:     scala.collection.immutable.HashSet[String]]()\\n143: \\n144:   private val lock = new Object()\\n145: \\n146:   // The maximum number of times we should try to update the resource acls in zookeeper before failing;\\n147:   // This should never occur, but is a safeguard just in case.\\n148:   protected[security] var maxUpdateRetries = 10\\n149: \\n150:   private val retryBackoffMs = 100\\n151:   private val retryBackoffJitterMs = 50\\n152: \\n153:   /**\\n154:    * Guaranteed to be called before any authorize call is made.\\n155:    */\\n156:   override def configure(javaConfigs: util.Map[String, _]): Unit = {\\n157:     val configs = javaConfigs.asScala\\n158:     val props = new java.util.Properties()\\n159:     configs.forKeyValue { (key, value) => props.put(key, value.toString) }\\n160: \\n161:     superUsers = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.SuperUsersProp).collect {\\n162:       case str: String if str.nonEmpty => str.split(\\\";\\\").map(s => SecurityUtils.parseKafkaPrincipal(s.trim)).toSet\\n163:     }.getOrElse(Set.empty[KafkaPrincipal])\\n164: \\n165:     shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.AllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFoundProp).exists(_.toString.toBoolean)\\n166: \\n167:     // Use `KafkaConfig` in order to get the default ZK config values if not present in `javaConfigs`. Note that this\\n168:     // means that `KafkaConfig.zkConnect` must always be set by the user (even if `AclAuthorizer.ZkUrlProp` is also\\n169:     // set).\\n170:     val kafkaConfig = KafkaConfig.fromProps(props, doLog = false)\\n171:     val zkUrl = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkUrlProp).map(_.toString).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkConnect)\\n172:     val zkConnectionTimeoutMs = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkConnectionTimeOutProp).map(_.toString.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkConnectionTimeoutMs)\\n173:     val zkSessionTimeOutMs = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkSessionTimeOutProp).map(_.toString.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkSessionTimeoutMs)\\n174:     val zkMaxInFlightRequests = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkMaxInFlightRequests).map(_.toString.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkMaxInFlightRequests)\\n175: \\n176:     val zkClientConfig = AclAuthorizer.zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfigAndMap(kafkaConfig, configs)\\n177:     val time = Time.SYSTEM\\n178:     // createChrootIfNecessary=true is necessary in case we are running in a KRaft cluster\\n179:     // because such a cluster will not create any chroot path in ZooKeeper (it doesn't connect to ZooKeeper)\\n180:     zkClient = KafkaZkClient(zkUrl, kafkaConfig.zkEnableSecureAcls, zkSessionTimeOutMs, zkConnectionTimeoutMs,\\n181:       zkMaxInFlightRequests, time, name = \\\"ACL authorizer\\\", zkClientConfig = zkClientConfig,\\n182:       metricGroup = \\\"kafka.security\\\", metricType = \\\"AclAuthorizer\\\", createChrootIfNecessary = true)\\n183:     zkClient.createAclPaths()\\n184: \\n185:     extendedAclSupport = kafkaConfig.interBrokerProtocolVersion >= KAFKA_2_0_IV1\\n186: \\n187:     // Start change listeners first and then populate the cache so that there is no timing window\\n188:     // between loading cache and processing change notifications.\\n189:     startZkChangeListeners()\\n190:     loadCache()\\n191:   }\\n192: \\n193:   override def start(serverInfo: AuthorizerServerInfo): util.Map[Endpoint, _ <: CompletionStage[Void]] = {\\n194:     serverInfo.endpoints.asScala.map { endpoint =>\\n195:       endpoint -> CompletableFuture.completedFuture[Void](null) }.toMap.asJava\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198:   override def authorize(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, actions: util.List[Action]): util.List[AuthorizationResult] = {\\n199:     actions.asScala.map { action => authorizeAction(requestContext, action) }.asJava\\n200:   }\\n201: \\n202:   override def createAcls(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\\n203:                           aclBindings: util.List[AclBinding]): util.List[_ <: CompletionStage[AclCreateResult]] = {\\n204:     val results = new Array[AclCreateResult](aclBindings.size)\\n205:     val aclsToCreate = aclBindings.asScala.zipWithIndex.filter { case (aclBinding, i) =>\\n206:       try {\\n207:         if (!extendedAclSupport && aclBinding.pattern.patternType == PatternType.PREFIXED) {\\n208:           throw new UnsupportedVersionException(s\\\"Adding ACLs on prefixed resource patterns requires \\\" +\\n209:             s\\\"${KafkaConfig.InterBrokerProtocolVersionProp} of $KAFKA_2_0_IV1 or greater\\\")\\n210:         }\\n211:         validateAclBinding(aclBinding)\\n212:         true\\n213:       } catch {\\n214:         case e: Throwable =>\\n215:           results(i) = new AclCreateResult(new InvalidRequestException(\\\"Failed to create ACL\\\", apiException(e)))\\n216:           false\\n217:       }\\n218:     }.groupBy(_._1.pattern)\\n219: \\n220:     if (aclsToCreate.nonEmpty) {\\n221:       lock synchronized {\\n222:         aclsToCreate.forKeyValue { (resource, aclsWithIndex) =>\\n223:           try {\\n224:             updateResourceAcls(resource) { currentAcls =>\\n225:               val newAcls = aclsWithIndex.map { case (acl, _) => new AclEntry(acl.entry) }\\n226:               currentAcls ++ newAcls\\n227:             }\\n228:             aclsWithIndex.foreach { case (_, index) => results(index) = AclCreateResult.SUCCESS }\\n229:           } catch {\\n230:             case e: Throwable =>\\n231:               aclsWithIndex.foreach { case (_, index) => results(index) = new AclCreateResult(apiException(e)) }\\n232:           }\\n233:         }\\n234:       }\\n235:     }\\n236:     results.toBuffer.map(CompletableFuture.completedFuture[AclCreateResult]).asJava\\n237:   }\\n238: \\n239:   /**\\n240:    *\\n241:    * <b>Concurrent updates:</b>\\n242:    * <ul>\\n243:    *   <li>If ACLs are created using [[kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer#createAcls]] while a delete is in\\n244:    *   progress, these ACLs may or may not be considered for deletion depending on the order of updates.\\n245:    *   The returned [[org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult]] indicates which ACLs were deleted.</li>\\n246:    *   <li>If the provided filters use resource pattern type\\n247:    *   [[org.apache.kafka.common.resource.PatternType#MATCH]] that needs to filter all resources to determine\\n248:    *   matching ACLs, only ACLs that have already been propagated to the broker processing the ACL update will be\\n249:    *   deleted. This may not include some ACLs that were persisted, but not yet propagated to all brokers. The\\n250:    *   returned [[org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult]] indicates which ACLs were deleted.</li>\\n251:    *   <li>If the provided filters use other resource pattern types that perform a direct match, all matching ACLs\\n252:    *   from previously completed [[kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer#createAcls]] are guaranteed to be deleted.</li>\\n253:    * </ul>\\n254:    */\\n255:   override def deleteAcls(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\\n256:                           aclBindingFilters: util.List[AclBindingFilter]): util.List[_ <: CompletionStage[AclDeleteResult]] = {\\n257:     val deletedBindings = new mutable.HashMap[AclBinding, Int]()\\n258:     val deleteExceptions = new mutable.HashMap[AclBinding, ApiException]()\\n259:     val filters = aclBindingFilters.asScala.zipWithIndex\\n260:     lock synchronized {\\n261:       // Find all potentially matching resource patterns from the provided filters and ACL cache and apply the filters\\n262:       val resources = aclCache.keys ++ filters.map(_._1.patternFilter).filter(_.matchesAtMostOne).flatMap(filterToResources)\\n263:       val resourcesToUpdate = resources.map { resource =>\\n264:         val matchingFilters = filters.filter { case (filter, _) =>\\n265:           filter.patternFilter.matches(resource)\\n266:         }\\n267:         resource -> matchingFilters\\n268:       }.toMap.filter(_._2.nonEmpty)\\n269: \\n270:       resourcesToUpdate.forKeyValue { (resource, matchingFilters) =>\\n271:         val resourceBindingsBeingDeleted = new mutable.HashMap[AclBinding, Int]()\\n272:         try {\\n273:           updateResourceAcls(resource) { currentAcls =>\\n274:             val aclsToRemove = currentAcls.filter { acl =>\\n275:               matchingFilters.exists { case (filter, index) =>\\n276:                 val matches = filter.entryFilter.matches(acl)\\n277:                 if (matches) {\\n278:                   val binding = new AclBinding(resource, acl)\\n279:                   deletedBindings.getOrElseUpdate(binding, index)\\n280:                   resourceBindingsBeingDeleted.getOrElseUpdate(binding, index)\\n281:                 }\\n282:                 matches\\n283:               }\\n284:             }\\n285:             currentAcls -- aclsToRemove\\n286:           }\\n287:         } catch {\\n288:           case e: Exception =>\\n289:             resourceBindingsBeingDeleted.keys.foreach { binding =>\\n290:               deleteExceptions.getOrElseUpdate(binding, apiException(e))\\n291:             }\\n292:         }\\n293:       }\\n294:     }\\n295:     val deletedResult = deletedBindings.groupBy(_._2).map { case (k, bindings) =>\\n296:       k -> bindings.keys.map { binding => new AclBindingDeleteResult(binding, deleteExceptions.get(binding).orNull) }\\n297:     }\\n298:     (0 until aclBindingFilters.size).map { i =>\\n299:       new AclDeleteResult(deletedResult.getOrElse(i, Set.empty[AclBindingDeleteResult]).toSet.asJava)\\n300:     }.map(CompletableFuture.completedFuture[AclDeleteResult]).asJava\\n301:   }\\n302: \\n303:   override def acls(filter: AclBindingFilter): lang.Iterable[AclBinding] = {\\n304:     val aclBindings = new util.ArrayList[AclBinding]()\\n305:     aclCache.forKeyValue { case (resource, versionedAcls) =>\\n306:       versionedAcls.acls.foreach { acl =>\\n307:         val binding = new AclBinding(resource, acl.ace)\\n308:         if (filter.matches(binding))\\n309:           aclBindings.add(binding)\\n310:       }\\n311:     }\\n312:     aclBindings\\n313:   }\\n314: \\n315:   override def close(): Unit = {\\n316:     aclChangeListeners.foreach(listener => listener.close())\\n317:     if (zkClient != null) zkClient.close()\\n318:   }\\n319: \\n320:   override def authorizeByResourceType(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\\n321:                                        op: AclOperation,\\n322:                                        resourceType: ResourceType): AuthorizationResult = {\\n323:     SecurityUtils.authorizeByResourceTypeCheckArgs(op, resourceType)\\n324: \\n325:     val principal = new KafkaPrincipal(\\n326:       requestContext.principal().getPrincipalType,\\n327:       requestContext.principal().getName)\\n328: \\n329:     if (isSuperUser(principal))\\n330:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\\n331: \\n332:     val resourceSnapshot = resourceCache\\n333:     val principalStr = principal.toString\\n334:     val host = requestContext.clientAddress().getHostAddress\\n335:     val action = new Action(op, new ResourcePattern(resourceType, \\\"NONE\\\", PatternType.UNKNOWN), 0, true, true)\\n336: \\n337:     val denyLiterals = matchingResources(\\n338:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\\n339: \\n340:     if (denyAll(denyLiterals)) {\\n341:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\\n342:       return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\\n343:     }\\n344: \\n345:     if (shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound) {\\n346:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\\n347:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\\n348:     }\\n349: \\n350:     val denyPrefixes = matchingResources(\\n351:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\\n352: \\n353:     if (denyLiterals.isEmpty && denyPrefixes.isEmpty) {\\n354:       if (hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\\n355:           || hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)) {\\n356:         logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\\n357:         return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\\n358:       } else {\\n359:         logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\\n360:         return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\\n361:       }\\n362:     }\\n363: \\n364:     val allowLiterals = matchingResources(\\n365:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\\n366:     val allowPrefixes = matchingResources(\\n367:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\\n368: \\n369:     if (allowAny(allowLiterals, allowPrefixes, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes)) {\\n370:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\\n371:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\\n372:     }\\n373: \\n374:     logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\\n375:     AuthorizationResult.DENIED\\n376:   }\\n377: \\n378:   private def matchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\\n379:                                 principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\\n380:                                 resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): ArrayBuffer[Set[String]] = {\\n381:     val matched = ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]()\\n382:     for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WildcardPrincipalString);\\n383:          h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WildcardHost);\\n384:          o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\\n385:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\\n386:         new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\\n387:       resourceSnapshot.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\\n388:         case Some(resources) => matched += resources\\n389:         case None =>\\n390:       }\\n391:     }\\n392:     matched\\n393:   }\\n394: \\n395:   private def hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\\n396:                                    principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\\n397:                                    resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): Boolean = {\\n398:     for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WildcardPrincipalString);\\n399:          h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WildcardHost);\\n400:          o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\\n401:           val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\\n402:             new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\\n403:           if (resourceSnapshot.contains(resourceTypeKey))\\n404:             return true\\n405:     }\\n406:     false\\n407:   }\\n408: \\n409:   private def denyAll(denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean =\\n410:     denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE))\\n411: \\n412: \\n413:   private def allowAny(allowLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], allowPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\\n414:                        denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\\n415:     (allowPrefixes.exists(_.exists(prefix => allowPrefix(prefix, denyPrefixes)))\\n416:       || allowLiterals.exists(_.exists(literal => allowLiteral(literal, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes))))\\n417:   }\\n418: \\n419:   private def allowLiteral(literalName: String, denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\\n420:                            denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\\n421:     literalName match {\\n422:       case ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE => true\\n423:       case _ => !denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(literalName)) && !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(literalName, denyPrefixes)\\n424:     }\\n425:   }\\n426: \\n427:   private def allowPrefix(prefixName: String,\\n428:                           denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\\n429:     !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(prefixName, denyPrefixes)\\n430:   }\\n431: \\n432:   private def hasDominantPrefixedDeny(resourceName: String, denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\\n433:     val sb = new StringBuilder\\n434:     for (ch <- resourceName.toCharArray) {\\n435:       sb.append(ch)\\n436:       if (denyPrefixes.exists(p => p.contains(sb.toString()))) {\\n437:         return true\\n438:       }\\n439:     }\\n440:     false\\n441:   }\\n442: \\n443: \\n444:   private def authorizeAction(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action): AuthorizationResult = {\\n445:     val resource = action.resourcePattern\\n446:     if (resource.patternType != PatternType.LITERAL) {\\n447:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Only literal resources are supported. Got: \\\" + resource.patternType)\\n448:     }\\n449: \\n450:     // ensure we compare identical classes\\n451:     val sessionPrincipal = requestContext.principal\\n452:     val principal = if (classOf[KafkaPrincipal] != sessionPrincipal.getClass)\\n453:       new KafkaPrincipal(sessionPrincipal.getPrincipalType, sessionPrincipal.getName)\\n454:     else\\n455:       sessionPrincipal\\n456: \\n457:     val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\\n458:     val operation = action.operation\\n459: \\n460:     def isEmptyAclAndAuthorized(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\\n461:       if (acls.isEmpty) {\\n462:         // No ACLs found for this resource, permission is determined by value of config allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found\\n463:         authorizerLogger.debug(s\\\"No acl found for resource $resource, authorized = $shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound\\\")\\n464:         shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound\\n465:       } else false\\n466:     }\\n467: \\n468:     def denyAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\\n469:       // Check if there are any Deny ACLs which would forbid this operation.\\n470:       matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, DENY, acls)\\n471:     }\\n472: \\n473:     def allowAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\\n474:       // Check if there are any Allow ACLs which would allow this operation.\\n475:       // Allowing read, write, delete, or alter implies allowing describe.\\n476:       // See #{org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation} for more details about ACL inheritance.\\n477:       val allowOps = operation match {\\n478:         case DESCRIBE => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE, READ, WRITE, DELETE, ALTER)\\n479:         case DESCRIBE_CONFIGS => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE_CONFIGS, ALTER_CONFIGS)\\n480:         case _ => Set[AclOperation](operation)\\n481:       }\\n482:       allowOps.exists(operation => matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, ALLOW, acls))\\n483:     }\\n484: \\n485:     def aclsAllowAccess = {\\n486:       // we allow an operation if no acls are found and user has configured to allow all users\\n487:       // when no acls are found or if no deny acls are found and at least one allow acls matches.\\n488:       val acls = matchingAcls(resource.resourceType, resource.name)\\n489:       isEmptyAclAndAuthorized(acls) || (!denyAclExists(acls) && allowAclExists(acls))\\n490:     }\\n491: \\n492:     // Evaluate if operation is allowed\\n493:     val authorized = isSuperUser(principal) || aclsAllowAccess\\n494: \\n495:     logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized)\\n496:     if (authorized) AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED else AuthorizationResult.DENIED\\n497:   }\\n498: \\n499:   def isSuperUser(principal: KafkaPrincipal): Boolean = {\\n500:     if (superUsers.contains(principal)) {\\n501:       authorizerLogger.debug(s\\\"principal = $principal is a super user, allowing operation without checking acls.\\\")\\n502:       true\\n503:     } else false\\n504:   }\\n505: \\n506:   @nowarn(\\\"cat=deprecation\\\")\\n507:   private def matchingAcls(resourceType: ResourceType, resourceName: String): AclSeqs = {\\n508:     // this code is performance sensitive, make sure to run AclAuthorizerBenchmark after any changes\\n509: \\n510:     // save aclCache reference to a local val to get a consistent view of the cache during acl updates.\\n511:     val aclCacheSnapshot = aclCache\\n512:     val wildcard = aclCacheSnapshot.get(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE, PatternType.LITERAL))\\n513:       .map(_.acls.toBuffer)\\n514:       .getOrElse(mutable.Buffer.empty)\\n515: \\n516:     val literal = aclCacheSnapshot.get(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, resourceName, PatternType.LITERAL))\\n517:       .map(_.acls.toBuffer)\\n518:       .getOrElse(mutable.Buffer.empty)\\n519: \\n520:     val prefixed = new ArrayBuffer[AclEntry]\\n521:     aclCacheSnapshot\\n522:       .from(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, resourceName, PatternType.PREFIXED))\\n523:       .to(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, resourceName.take(1), PatternType.PREFIXED))\\n524:       .forKeyValue { (resource, acls) =>\\n525:         if (resourceName.startsWith(resource.name)) prefixed ++= acls.acls\\n526:       }\\n527: \\n528:     new AclSeqs(prefixed, wildcard, literal)\\n529:   }\\n530: \\n531:   private def matchingAclExists(operation: AclOperation,\\n532:                                 resource: ResourcePattern,\\n533:                                 principal: KafkaPrincipal,\\n534:                                 host: String,\\n535:                                 permissionType: AclPermissionType,\\n536:                                 acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\\n537:     acls.find { acl =>\\n538:       acl.permissionType == permissionType &&\\n539:         (acl.kafkaPrincipal == principal || acl.kafkaPrincipal == AclEntry.WildcardPrincipal) &&\\n540:         (operation == acl.operation || acl.operation == AclOperation.ALL) &&\\n541:         (acl.host == host || acl.host == AclEntry.WildcardHost)\\n542:     }.exists { acl =>\\n543:       authorizerLogger.debug(s\\\"operation = $operation on resource = $resource from host = $host is $permissionType based on acl = $acl\\\")\\n544:       true\\n545:     }\\n546:   }\\n547: \\n548:   private def loadCache(): Unit = {\\n549:     lock synchronized  {\\n550:       ZkAclStore.stores.foreach(store => {\\n551:         val resourceTypes = zkClient.getResourceTypes(store.patternType)\\n552:         for (rType <- resourceTypes) {\\n553:           val resourceType = Try(SecurityUtils.resourceType(rType))\\n554:           resourceType match {\\n555:             case Success(resourceTypeObj) =>\\n556:               val resourceNames = zkClient.getResourceNames(store.patternType, resourceTypeObj)\\n557:               for (resourceName <- resourceNames) {\\n558:                 val resource = new ResourcePattern(resourceTypeObj, resourceName, store.patternType)\\n559:                 val versionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(resource)\\n560:                 updateCache(resource, versionedAcls)\\n561:               }\\n562:             case Failure(_) => warn(s\\\"Ignoring unknown ResourceType: $rType\\\")\\n563:           }\\n564:         }\\n565:       })\\n566:     }\\n567:   }\\n568: \\n569:   private[authorizer] def startZkChangeListeners(): Unit = {\\n570:     aclChangeListeners = ZkAclChangeStore.stores\\n571:       .map(store => store.createListener(AclChangedNotificationHandler, zkClient))\\n572:   }\\n573: \\n574:   private def filterToResources(filter: ResourcePatternFilter): Set[ResourcePattern] = {\\n575:     filter.patternType match {\\n576:       case PatternType.LITERAL | PatternType.PREFIXED =>\\n577:         Set(new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, filter.patternType))\\n578:       case PatternType.ANY =>\\n579:         Set(new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, PatternType.LITERAL),\\n580:           new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, PatternType.PREFIXED))\\n581:       case _ => throw new IllegalArgumentException(s\\\"Cannot determine matching resources for patternType $filter\\\")\\n582:     }\\n583:   }\\n584: \\n585:   def logAuditMessage(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action, authorized: Boolean): Unit = {\\n586:     def logMessage: String = {\\n587:       val principal = requestContext.principal\\n588:       val operation = SecurityUtils.operationName(action.operation)\\n589:       val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\\n590:       val resourceType = SecurityUtils.resourceTypeName(action.resourcePattern.resourceType)\\n591:       val resource = s\\\"$resourceType$ResourceSeparator${action.resourcePattern.patternType}$ResourceSeparator${action.resourcePattern.name}\\\"\\n592:       val authResult = if (authorized) \\\"Allowed\\\" else \\\"Denied\\\"\\n593:       val apiKey = if (ApiKeys.hasId(requestContext.requestType)) ApiKeys.forId(requestContext.requestType).name else requestContext.requestType\\n594:       val refCount = action.resourceReferenceCount\\n595: \\n596:       s\\\"Principal = $principal is $authResult Operation = $operation \\\" +\\n597:         s\\\"from host = $host on resource = $resource for request = $apiKey with resourceRefCount = $refCount\\\"\\n598:     }\\n599: \\n600:     if (authorized) {\\n601:       // logIfAllowed is true if access is granted to the resource as a result of this authorization.\\n602:       // In this case, log at debug level. If false, no access is actually granted, the result is used\\n603:       // only to determine authorized operations. So log only at trace level.\\n604:       if (action.logIfAllowed)\\n605:         authorizerLogger.debug(logMessage)\\n606:       else\\n607:         authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\\n608:     } else {\\n609:       // logIfDenied is true if access to the resource was explicitly requested. Since this is an attempt\\n610:       // to access unauthorized resources, log at info level. If false, this is either a request to determine\\n611:       // authorized operations or a filter (e.g for regex subscriptions) to filter out authorized resources.\\n612:       // In this case, log only at trace level.\\n613:       if (action.logIfDenied)\\n614:         authorizerLogger.info(logMessage)\\n615:       else\\n616:         authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\\n617:     }\\n618:   }\\n619: \\n620:   /**\\n621:     * Safely updates the resources ACLs by ensuring reads and writes respect the expected zookeeper version.\\n622:     * Continues to retry until it successfully updates zookeeper.\\n623:     *\\n624:     * Returns a boolean indicating if the content of the ACLs was actually changed.\\n625:     *\\n626:     * @param resource the resource to change ACLs for\\n627:     * @param getNewAcls function to transform existing acls to new ACLs\\n628:     * @return boolean indicating if a change was made\\n629:     */\\n630:   private def updateResourceAcls(resource: ResourcePattern)(getNewAcls: Set[AclEntry] => Set[AclEntry]): Boolean = {\\n631:     var currentVersionedAcls =\\n632:       if (aclCache.contains(resource))\\n633:         getAclsFromCache(resource)\\n634:       else\\n635:         getAclsFromZk(resource)\\n636:     var newVersionedAcls: VersionedAcls = null\\n637:     var writeComplete = false\\n638:     var retries = 0\\n639:     while (!writeComplete && retries <= maxUpdateRetries) {\\n640:       val newAcls = getNewAcls(currentVersionedAcls.acls)\\n641:       val (updateSucceeded, updateVersion) =\\n642:         if (newAcls.nonEmpty) {\\n643:           if (currentVersionedAcls.exists)\\n644:             zkClient.conditionalSetAclsForResource(resource, newAcls, currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion)\\n645:           else\\n646:             zkClient.createAclsForResourceIfNotExists(resource, newAcls)\\n647:         } else {\\n648:           trace(s\\\"Deleting path for $resource because it had no ACLs remaining\\\")\\n649:           (zkClient.conditionalDelete(resource, currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion), 0)\\n650:         }\\n651: \\n652:       if (!updateSucceeded) {\\n653:         trace(s\\\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource. Used version ${currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion}. Reading data and retrying update.\\\")\\n654:         Thread.sleep(backoffTime)\\n655:         currentVersionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(resource)\\n656:         retries += 1\\n657:       } else {\\n658:         newVersionedAcls = VersionedAcls(newAcls, updateVersion)\\n659:         writeComplete = updateSucceeded\\n660:       }\\n661:     }\\n662: \\n663:     if (!writeComplete)\\n664:       throw new IllegalStateException(s\\\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource after trying a maximum of $maxUpdateRetries times\\\")\\n665: \\n666:     if (newVersionedAcls.acls != currentVersionedAcls.acls) {\\n667:       info(s\\\"Updated ACLs for $resource with new version ${newVersionedAcls.zkVersion}\\\")\\n668:       debug(s\\\"Updated ACLs for $resource to $newVersionedAcls\\\")\\n669:       updateCache(resource, newVersionedAcls)\\n670:       updateAclChangedFlag(resource)\\n671:       true\\n672:     } else {\\n673:       debug(s\\\"Updated ACLs for $resource, no change was made\\\")\\n674:       updateCache(resource, newVersionedAcls) // Even if no change, update the version\\n675:       false\\n676:     }\\n677:   }\\n678: \\n679:   private def getAclsFromCache(resource: ResourcePattern): VersionedAcls = {\\n680:     aclCache.getOrElse(resource, throw new IllegalArgumentException(s\\\"ACLs do not exist in the cache for resource $resource\\\"))\\n681:   }\\n682: \\n683:   private def getAclsFromZk(resource: ResourcePattern): VersionedAcls = {\\n684:     zkClient.getVersionedAclsForResource(resource)\\n685:   }\\n686: \\n687:   // Visible for benchmark\\n688:   def updateCache(resource: ResourcePattern, versionedAcls: VersionedAcls): Unit = {\\n689:     val currentAces: Set[AccessControlEntry] = aclCache.get(resource).map(_.acls.map(_.ace)).getOrElse(Set.empty)\\n690:     val newAces: Set[AccessControlEntry] = versionedAcls.acls.map(aclEntry => aclEntry.ace)\\n691:     val acesToAdd = newAces.diff(currentAces)\\n692:     val acesToRemove = currentAces.diff(newAces)\\n693: \\n694:     acesToAdd.foreach(ace => {\\n695:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(ace, resource.resourceType(), resource.patternType())\\n696:       resourceCache.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\\n697:         case Some(resources) => resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> (resources + resource.name()))\\n698:         case None => resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> immutable.HashSet(resource.name()))\\n699:       }\\n700:     })\\n701:     acesToRemove.foreach(ace => {\\n702:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(ace, resource.resourceType(), resource.patternType())\\n703:       resourceCache.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\\n704:         case Some(resources) =>\\n705:           val newResources = resources - resource.name()\\n706:           if (newResources.isEmpty) {\\n707:             resourceCache -= resourceTypeKey\\n708:           } else {\\n709:             resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> newResources)\\n710:           }\\n711:         case None =>\\n712:       }\\n713:     })\\n714: \\n715:     if (versionedAcls.acls.nonEmpty) {\\n716:       aclCache = aclCache.updated(resource, versionedAcls)\\n717:     } else {\\n718:       aclCache -= resource\\n719:     }\\n720:   }\\n721: \\n722:   private def updateAclChangedFlag(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\\n723:     zkClient.createAclChangeNotification(resource)\\n724:   }\\n725: \\n726:   private def backoffTime = {\\n727:     retryBackoffMs + Random.nextInt(retryBackoffJitterMs)\\n728:   }\\n729: \\n730:   private def apiException(e: Throwable): ApiException = {\\n731:     e match {\\n732:       case e1: ApiException => e1\\n733:       case e1 => new ApiException(e1)\\n734:     }\\n735:   }\\n736: \\n737:   private[authorizer] def processAclChangeNotification(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\\n738:     lock synchronized {\\n739:       val versionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(resource)\\n740:       info(s\\\"Processing Acl change notification for $resource, versionedAcls : ${versionedAcls.acls}, zkVersion : ${versionedAcls.zkVersion}\\\")\\n741:       updateCache(resource, versionedAcls)\\n742:     }\\n743:   }\\n744: \\n745:   object AclChangedNotificationHandler extends AclChangeNotificationHandler {\\n746:     override def processNotification(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\\n747:       processAclChangeNotification(resource)\\n748:     }\\n749:   }\\n750: \\n751:   private case class ResourceTypeKey(ace: AccessControlEntry,\\n752:                                      resourceType: ResourceType,\\n753:                                      patternType: PatternType)\\n754: }\\n755: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sourcegraph-testing/kafka@a61b998c5df7ca9baccc5d966cb1e95108cbdee9/-/blob/core/src/main/scala/kafka/security/authorizer/AclAuthorizer.scala\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n3:  * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\n4:  * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\n5:  * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\n6:  * (the \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\n7:  * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n8:  *\n9:  *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n10:  *\n11:  * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n12:  * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n13:  * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n14:  * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n15:  * limitations under the License.\n16:  */\n17: package kafka.security.authorizer\n18: \n19: import java.{lang, util}\n20: import java.util.concurrent.{CompletableFuture, CompletionStage}\n21: \n22: import com.typesafe.scalalogging.Logger\n23: import kafka.api.KAFKA_2_0_IV1\n24: import kafka.security.authorizer.AclEntry.ResourceSeparator\n25: import kafka.server.{KafkaConfig, KafkaServer}\n26: import kafka.utils._\n27: import kafka.utils.Implicits._\n28: import kafka.zk._\n29: import org.apache.kafka.common.Endpoint\n30: import org.apache.kafka.common.acl._\n31: import org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation._\n32: import org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclPermissionType.{ALLOW, DENY}\n33: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.{ApiException, InvalidRequestException, UnsupportedVersionException}\n34: import org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiKeys\n35: import org.apache.kafka.common.resource._\n36: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.auth.KafkaPrincipal\n37: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.{SecurityUtils, Time}\n38: import org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult.AclBindingDeleteResult\n39: import org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer._\n40: import org.apache.zookeeper.client.ZKClientConfig\n41: \n42: import scala.annotation.nowarn\n43: import scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer\n44: import scala.collection.{Seq, immutable, mutable}\n45: import scala.jdk.CollectionConverters._\n46: import scala.util.{Failure, Random, Success, Try}\n47: \n48: object AclAuthorizer {\n49:   // Optional override zookeeper cluster configuration where acls will be stored. If not specified,\n50:   // acls will be stored in the same zookeeper where all other kafka broker metadata is stored.\n51:   val configPrefix = \"authorizer.\"\n52:   val ZkUrlProp = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.url\"\n53:   val ZkConnectionTimeOutProp = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms\"\n54:   val ZkSessionTimeOutProp = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.session.timeout.ms\"\n55:   val ZkMaxInFlightRequests = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.max.in.flight.requests\"\n56: \n57:   // Semi-colon separated list of users that will be treated as super users and will have access to all the resources\n58:   // for all actions from all hosts, defaults to no super users.\n59:   val SuperUsersProp = \"super.users\"\n60:   // If set to true when no acls are found for a resource, authorizer allows access to everyone. Defaults to false.\n61:   val AllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFoundProp = \"allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found\"\n62: \n63:   case class VersionedAcls(acls: Set[AclEntry], zkVersion: Int) {\n64:     def exists: Boolean = zkVersion != ZkVersion.UnknownVersion\n65:   }\n66: \n67:   class AclSeqs(seqs: Seq[AclEntry]*) {\n68:     def find(p: AclEntry => Boolean): Option[AclEntry] = {\n69:       // Lazily iterate through the inner `Seq` elements and stop as soon as we find a match\n70:       val it = seqs.iterator.flatMap(_.find(p))\n71:       if (it.hasNext) Some(it.next())\n72:       else None\n73:     }\n74: \n75:     def isEmpty: Boolean = !seqs.exists(_.nonEmpty)\n76:   }\n77: \n78:   val NoAcls = VersionedAcls(Set.empty, ZkVersion.UnknownVersion)\n79:   val WildcardHost = \"*\"\n80: \n81:   // Orders by resource type, then resource pattern type and finally reverse ordering by name.\n82:   class ResourceOrdering extends Ordering[ResourcePattern] {\n83: \n84:     def compare(a: ResourcePattern, b: ResourcePattern): Int = {\n85:       val rt = a.resourceType.compareTo(b.resourceType)\n86:       if (rt != 0)\n87:         rt\n88:       else {\n89:         val rnt = a.patternType.compareTo(b.patternType)\n90:         if (rnt != 0)\n91:           rnt\n92:         else\n93:           (a.name compare b.name) * -1\n94:       }\n95:     }\n96:   }\n97: \n98:   private[authorizer] def zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfigAndMap(kafkaConfig: KafkaConfig, configMap: mutable.Map[String, _<:Any]): ZKClientConfig = {\n99:     val zkSslClientEnable = configMap.get(AclAuthorizer.configPrefix + KafkaConfig.ZkSslClientEnableProp).\n100:       map(_.toString).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkSslClientEnable.toString).toBoolean\n101:     if (!zkSslClientEnable)\n102:       new ZKClientConfig\n103:     else {\n104:       // start with the base config from the Kafka configuration\n105:       // be sure to force creation since the zkSslClientEnable property in the kafkaConfig could be false\n106:       val zkClientConfig = KafkaServer.zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfig(kafkaConfig, true)\n107:       // add in any prefixed overlays\n108:       KafkaConfig.ZkSslConfigToSystemPropertyMap.forKeyValue { (kafkaProp, sysProp) =>\n109:         configMap.get(AclAuthorizer.configPrefix + kafkaProp).foreach { prefixedValue =>\n110:           zkClientConfig.setProperty(sysProp,\n111:             if (kafkaProp == KafkaConfig.ZkSslEndpointIdentificationAlgorithmProp)\n112:               (prefixedValue.toString.toUpperCase == \"HTTPS\").toString\n113:             else\n114:               prefixedValue.toString)\n115:         }\n116:       }\n117:       zkClientConfig\n118:     }\n119:   }\n120: \n121:   private def validateAclBinding(aclBinding: AclBinding): Unit = {\n122:     if (aclBinding.isUnknown)\n123:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"ACL binding contains unknown elements\")\n124:   }\n125: }\n126: \n127: class AclAuthorizer extends Authorizer with Logging {\n128:   import kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer._\n129: \n130:   private[security] val authorizerLogger = Logger(\"kafka.authorizer.logger\")\n131:   private var superUsers = Set.empty[KafkaPrincipal]\n132:   private var shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound = false\n133:   private var zkClient: KafkaZkClient = _\n134:   private var aclChangeListeners: Iterable[AclChangeSubscription] = Iterable.empty\n135:   private var extendedAclSupport: Boolean = _\n136: \n137:   @volatile\n138:   private var aclCache = new scala.collection.immutable.TreeMap[ResourcePattern, VersionedAcls]()(new ResourceOrdering)\n139: \n140:   @volatile\n141:   private var resourceCache = new scala.collection.immutable.HashMap[ResourceTypeKey,\n142:     scala.collection.immutable.HashSet[String]]()\n143: \n144:   private val lock = new Object()\n145: \n146:   // The maximum number of times we should try to update the resource acls in zookeeper before failing;\n147:   // This should never occur, but is a safeguard just in case.\n148:   protected[security] var maxUpdateRetries = 10\n149: \n150:   private val retryBackoffMs = 100\n151:   private val retryBackoffJitterMs = 50\n152: \n153:   /**\n154:    * Guaranteed to be called before any authorize call is made.\n155:    */\n156:   override def configure(javaConfigs: util.Map[String, _]): Unit = {\n157:     val configs = javaConfigs.asScala\n158:     val props = new java.util.Properties()\n159:     configs.forKeyValue { (key, value) => props.put(key, value.toString) }\n160: \n161:     superUsers = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.SuperUsersProp).collect {\n162:       case str: String if str.nonEmpty => str.split(\";\").map(s => SecurityUtils.parseKafkaPrincipal(s.trim)).toSet\n163:     }.getOrElse(Set.empty[KafkaPrincipal])\n164: \n165:     shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.AllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFoundProp).exists(_.toString.toBoolean)\n166: \n167:     // Use `KafkaConfig` in order to get the default ZK config values if not present in `javaConfigs`. Note that this\n168:     // means that `KafkaConfig.zkConnect` must always be set by the user (even if `AclAuthorizer.ZkUrlProp` is also\n169:     // set).\n170:     val kafkaConfig = KafkaConfig.fromProps(props, doLog = false)\n171:     val zkUrl = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkUrlProp).map(_.toString).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkConnect)\n172:     val zkConnectionTimeoutMs = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkConnectionTimeOutProp).map(_.toString.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkConnectionTimeoutMs)\n173:     val zkSessionTimeOutMs = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkSessionTimeOutProp).map(_.toString.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkSessionTimeoutMs)\n174:     val zkMaxInFlightRequests = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkMaxInFlightRequests).map(_.toString.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkMaxInFlightRequests)\n175: \n176:     val zkClientConfig = AclAuthorizer.zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfigAndMap(kafkaConfig, configs)\n177:     val time = Time.SYSTEM\n178:     // createChrootIfNecessary=true is necessary in case we are running in a KRaft cluster\n179:     // because such a cluster will not create any chroot path in ZooKeeper (it doesn't connect to ZooKeeper)\n180:     zkClient = KafkaZkClient(zkUrl, kafkaConfig.zkEnableSecureAcls, zkSessionTimeOutMs, zkConnectionTimeoutMs,\n181:       zkMaxInFlightRequests, time, name = \"ACL authorizer\", zkClientConfig = zkClientConfig,\n182:       metricGroup = \"kafka.security\", metricType = \"AclAuthorizer\", createChrootIfNecessary = true)\n183:     zkClient.createAclPaths()\n184: \n185:     extendedAclSupport = kafkaConfig.interBrokerProtocolVersion >= KAFKA_2_0_IV1\n186: \n187:     // Start change listeners first and then populate the cache so that there is no timing window\n188:     // between loading cache and processing change notifications.\n189:     startZkChangeListeners()\n190:     loadCache()\n191:   }\n192: \n193:   override def start(serverInfo: AuthorizerServerInfo): util.Map[Endpoint, _ <: CompletionStage[Void]] = {\n194:     serverInfo.endpoints.asScala.map { endpoint =>\n195:       endpoint -> CompletableFuture.completedFuture[Void](null) }.toMap.asJava\n196:   }\n197: \n198:   override def authorize(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, actions: util.List[Action]): util.List[AuthorizationResult] = {\n199:     actions.asScala.map { action => authorizeAction(requestContext, action) }.asJava\n200:   }\n201: \n202:   override def createAcls(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\n203:                           aclBindings: util.List[AclBinding]): util.List[_ <: CompletionStage[AclCreateResult]] = {\n204:     val results = new Array[AclCreateResult](aclBindings.size)\n205:     val aclsToCreate = aclBindings.asScala.zipWithIndex.filter { case (aclBinding, i) =>\n206:       try {\n207:         if (!extendedAclSupport && aclBinding.pattern.patternType == PatternType.PREFIXED) {\n208:           throw new UnsupportedVersionException(s\"Adding ACLs on prefixed resource patterns requires \" +\n209:             s\"${KafkaConfig.InterBrokerProtocolVersionProp} of $KAFKA_2_0_IV1 or greater\")\n210:         }\n211:         validateAclBinding(aclBinding)\n212:         true\n213:       } catch {\n214:         case e: Throwable =>\n215:           results(i) = new AclCreateResult(new InvalidRequestException(\"Failed to create ACL\", apiException(e)))\n216:           false\n217:       }\n218:     }.groupBy(_._1.pattern)\n219: \n220:     if (aclsToCreate.nonEmpty) {\n221:       lock synchronized {\n222:         aclsToCreate.forKeyValue { (resource, aclsWithIndex) =>\n223:           try {\n224:             updateResourceAcls(resource) { currentAcls =>\n225:               val newAcls = aclsWithIndex.map { case (acl, _) => new AclEntry(acl.entry) }\n226:               currentAcls ++ newAcls\n227:             }\n228:             aclsWithIndex.foreach { case (_, index) => results(index) = AclCreateResult.SUCCESS }\n229:           } catch {\n230:             case e: Throwable =>\n231:               aclsWithIndex.foreach { case (_, index) => results(index) = new AclCreateResult(apiException(e)) }\n232:           }\n233:         }\n234:       }\n235:     }\n236:     results.toBuffer.map(CompletableFuture.completedFuture[AclCreateResult]).asJava\n237:   }\n238: \n239:   /**\n240:    *\n241:    * <b>Concurrent updates:</b>\n242:    * <ul>\n243:    *   <li>If ACLs are created using [[kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer#createAcls]] while a delete is in\n244:    *   progress, these ACLs may or may not be considered for deletion depending on the order of updates.\n245:    *   The returned [[org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult]] indicates which ACLs were deleted.</li>\n246:    *   <li>If the provided filters use resource pattern type\n247:    *   [[org.apache.kafka.common.resource.PatternType#MATCH]] that needs to filter all resources to determine\n248:    *   matching ACLs, only ACLs that have already been propagated to the broker processing the ACL update will be\n249:    *   deleted. This may not include some ACLs that were persisted, but not yet propagated to all brokers. The\n250:    *   returned [[org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult]] indicates which ACLs were deleted.</li>\n251:    *   <li>If the provided filters use other resource pattern types that perform a direct match, all matching ACLs\n252:    *   from previously completed [[kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer#createAcls]] are guaranteed to be deleted.</li>\n253:    * </ul>\n254:    */\n255:   override def deleteAcls(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\n256:                           aclBindingFilters: util.List[AclBindingFilter]): util.List[_ <: CompletionStage[AclDeleteResult]] = {\n257:     val deletedBindings = new mutable.HashMap[AclBinding, Int]()\n258:     val deleteExceptions = new mutable.HashMap[AclBinding, ApiException]()\n259:     val filters = aclBindingFilters.asScala.zipWithIndex\n260:     lock synchronized {\n261:       // Find all potentially matching resource patterns from the provided filters and ACL cache and apply the filters\n262:       val resources = aclCache.keys ++ filters.map(_._1.patternFilter).filter(_.matchesAtMostOne).flatMap(filterToResources)\n263:       val resourcesToUpdate = resources.map { resource =>\n264:         val matchingFilters = filters.filter { case (filter, _) =>\n265:           filter.patternFilter.matches(resource)\n266:         }\n267:         resource -> matchingFilters\n268:       }.toMap.filter(_._2.nonEmpty)\n269: \n270:       resourcesToUpdate.forKeyValue { (resource, matchingFilters) =>\n271:         val resourceBindingsBeingDeleted = new mutable.HashMap[AclBinding, Int]()\n272:         try {\n273:           updateResourceAcls(resource) { currentAcls =>\n274:             val aclsToRemove = currentAcls.filter { acl =>\n275:               matchingFilters.exists { case (filter, index) =>\n276:                 val matches = filter.entryFilter.matches(acl)\n277:                 if (matches) {\n278:                   val binding = new AclBinding(resource, acl)\n279:                   deletedBindings.getOrElseUpdate(binding, index)\n280:                   resourceBindingsBeingDeleted.getOrElseUpdate(binding, index)\n281:                 }\n282:                 matches\n283:               }\n284:             }\n285:             currentAcls -- aclsToRemove\n286:           }\n287:         } catch {\n288:           case e: Exception =>\n289:             resourceBindingsBeingDeleted.keys.foreach { binding =>\n290:               deleteExceptions.getOrElseUpdate(binding, apiException(e))\n291:             }\n292:         }\n293:       }\n294:     }\n295:     val deletedResult = deletedBindings.groupBy(_._2).map { case (k, bindings) =>\n296:       k -> bindings.keys.map { binding => new AclBindingDeleteResult(binding, deleteExceptions.get(binding).orNull) }\n297:     }\n298:     (0 until aclBindingFilters.size).map { i =>\n299:       new AclDeleteResult(deletedResult.getOrElse(i, Set.empty[AclBindingDeleteResult]).toSet.asJava)\n300:     }.map(CompletableFuture.completedFuture[AclDeleteResult]).asJava\n301:   }\n302: \n303:   override def acls(filter: AclBindingFilter): lang.Iterable[AclBinding] = {\n304:     val aclBindings = new util.ArrayList[AclBinding]()\n305:     aclCache.forKeyValue { case (resource, versionedAcls) =>\n306:       versionedAcls.acls.foreach { acl =>\n307:         val binding = new AclBinding(resource, acl.ace)\n308:         if (filter.matches(binding))\n309:           aclBindings.add(binding)\n310:       }\n311:     }\n312:     aclBindings\n313:   }\n314: \n315:   override def close(): Unit = {\n316:     aclChangeListeners.foreach(listener => listener.close())\n317:     if (zkClient != null) zkClient.close()\n318:   }\n319: \n320:   override def authorizeByResourceType(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\n321:                                        op: AclOperation,\n322:                                        resourceType: ResourceType): AuthorizationResult = {\n323:     SecurityUtils.authorizeByResourceTypeCheckArgs(op, resourceType)\n324: \n325:     val principal = new KafkaPrincipal(\n326:       requestContext.principal().getPrincipalType,\n327:       requestContext.principal().getName)\n328: \n329:     if (isSuperUser(principal))\n330:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n331: \n332:     val resourceSnapshot = resourceCache\n333:     val principalStr = principal.toString\n334:     val host = requestContext.clientAddress().getHostAddress\n335:     val action = new Action(op, new ResourcePattern(resourceType, \"NONE\", PatternType.UNKNOWN), 0, true, true)\n336: \n337:     val denyLiterals = matchingResources(\n338:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\n339: \n340:     if (denyAll(denyLiterals)) {\n341:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n342:       return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n343:     }\n344: \n345:     if (shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound) {\n346:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n347:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n348:     }\n349: \n350:     val denyPrefixes = matchingResources(\n351:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n352: \n353:     if (denyLiterals.isEmpty && denyPrefixes.isEmpty) {\n354:       if (hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n355:           || hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)) {\n356:         logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n357:         return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n358:       } else {\n359:         logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n360:         return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n361:       }\n362:     }\n363: \n364:     val allowLiterals = matchingResources(\n365:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\n366:     val allowPrefixes = matchingResources(\n367:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n368: \n369:     if (allowAny(allowLiterals, allowPrefixes, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes)) {\n370:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n371:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n372:     }\n373: \n374:     logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n375:     AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n376:   }\n377: \n378:   private def matchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\n379:                                 principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\n380:                                 resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): ArrayBuffer[Set[String]] = {\n381:     val matched = ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]()\n382:     for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WildcardPrincipalString);\n383:          h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WildcardHost);\n384:          o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\n385:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\n386:         new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\n387:       resourceSnapshot.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n388:         case Some(resources) => matched += resources\n389:         case None =>\n390:       }\n391:     }\n392:     matched\n393:   }\n394: \n395:   private def hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\n396:                                    principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\n397:                                    resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): Boolean = {\n398:     for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WildcardPrincipalString);\n399:          h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WildcardHost);\n400:          o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\n401:           val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\n402:             new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\n403:           if (resourceSnapshot.contains(resourceTypeKey))\n404:             return true\n405:     }\n406:     false\n407:   }\n408: \n409:   private def denyAll(denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean =\n410:     denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE))\n411: \n412: \n413:   private def allowAny(allowLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], allowPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\n414:                        denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n415:     (allowPrefixes.exists(_.exists(prefix => allowPrefix(prefix, denyPrefixes)))\n416:       || allowLiterals.exists(_.exists(literal => allowLiteral(literal, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes))))\n417:   }\n418: \n419:   private def allowLiteral(literalName: String, denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\n420:                            denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n421:     literalName match {\n422:       case ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE => true\n423:       case _ => !denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(literalName)) && !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(literalName, denyPrefixes)\n424:     }\n425:   }\n426: \n427:   private def allowPrefix(prefixName: String,\n428:                           denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n429:     !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(prefixName, denyPrefixes)\n430:   }\n431: \n432:   private def hasDominantPrefixedDeny(resourceName: String, denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n433:     val sb = new StringBuilder\n434:     for (ch <- resourceName.toCharArray) {\n435:       sb.append(ch)\n436:       if (denyPrefixes.exists(p => p.contains(sb.toString()))) {\n437:         return true\n438:       }\n439:     }\n440:     false\n441:   }\n442: \n443: \n444:   private def authorizeAction(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action): AuthorizationResult = {\n445:     val resource = action.resourcePattern\n446:     if (resource.patternType != PatternType.LITERAL) {\n447:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Only literal resources are supported. Got: \" + resource.patternType)\n448:     }\n449: \n450:     // ensure we compare identical classes\n451:     val sessionPrincipal = requestContext.principal\n452:     val principal = if (classOf[KafkaPrincipal] != sessionPrincipal.getClass)\n453:       new KafkaPrincipal(sessionPrincipal.getPrincipalType, sessionPrincipal.getName)\n454:     else\n455:       sessionPrincipal\n456: \n457:     val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\n458:     val operation = action.operation\n459: \n460:     def isEmptyAclAndAuthorized(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n461:       if (acls.isEmpty) {\n462:         // No ACLs found for this resource, permission is determined by value of config allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found\n463:         authorizerLogger.debug(s\"No acl found for resource $resource, authorized = $shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound\")\n464:         shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound\n465:       } else false\n466:     }\n467: \n468:     def denyAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n469:       // Check if there are any Deny ACLs which would forbid this operation.\n470:       matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, DENY, acls)\n471:     }\n472: \n473:     def allowAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n474:       // Check if there are any Allow ACLs which would allow this operation.\n475:       // Allowing read, write, delete, or alter implies allowing describe.\n476:       // See #{org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation} for more details about ACL inheritance.\n477:       val allowOps = operation match {\n478:         case DESCRIBE => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE, READ, WRITE, DELETE, ALTER)\n479:         case DESCRIBE_CONFIGS => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE_CONFIGS, ALTER_CONFIGS)\n480:         case _ => Set[AclOperation](operation)\n481:       }\n482:       allowOps.exists(operation => matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, ALLOW, acls))\n483:     }\n484: \n485:     def aclsAllowAccess = {\n486:       // we allow an operation if no acls are found and user has configured to allow all users\n487:       // when no acls are found or if no deny acls are found and at least one allow acls matches.\n488:       val acls = matchingAcls(resource.resourceType, resource.name)\n489:       isEmptyAclAndAuthorized(acls) || (!denyAclExists(acls) && allowAclExists(acls))\n490:     }\n491: \n492:     // Evaluate if operation is allowed\n493:     val authorized = isSuperUser(principal) || aclsAllowAccess\n494: \n495:     logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized)\n496:     if (authorized) AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED else AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n497:   }\n498: \n499:   def isSuperUser(principal: KafkaPrincipal): Boolean = {\n500:     if (superUsers.contains(principal)) {\n501:       authorizerLogger.debug(s\"principal = $principal is a super user, allowing operation without checking acls.\")\n502:       true\n503:     } else false\n504:   }\n505: \n506:   @nowarn(\"cat=deprecation\")\n507:   private def matchingAcls(resourceType: ResourceType, resourceName: String): AclSeqs = {\n508:     // this code is performance sensitive, make sure to run AclAuthorizerBenchmark after any changes\n509: \n510:     // save aclCache reference to a local val to get a consistent view of the cache during acl updates.\n511:     val aclCacheSnapshot = aclCache\n512:     val wildcard = aclCacheSnapshot.get(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE, PatternType.LITERAL))\n513:       .map(_.acls.toBuffer)\n514:       .getOrElse(mutable.Buffer.empty)\n515: \n516:     val literal = aclCacheSnapshot.get(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, resourceName, PatternType.LITERAL))\n517:       .map(_.acls.toBuffer)\n518:       .getOrElse(mutable.Buffer.empty)\n519: \n520:     val prefixed = new ArrayBuffer[AclEntry]\n521:     aclCacheSnapshot\n522:       .from(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, resourceName, PatternType.PREFIXED))\n523:       .to(new ResourcePattern(resourceType, resourceName.take(1), PatternType.PREFIXED))\n524:       .forKeyValue { (resource, acls) =>\n525:         if (resourceName.startsWith(resource.name)) prefixed ++= acls.acls\n526:       }\n527: \n528:     new AclSeqs(prefixed, wildcard, literal)\n529:   }\n530: \n531:   private def matchingAclExists(operation: AclOperation,\n532:                                 resource: ResourcePattern,\n533:                                 principal: KafkaPrincipal,\n534:                                 host: String,\n535:                                 permissionType: AclPermissionType,\n536:                                 acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n537:     acls.find { acl =>\n538:       acl.permissionType == permissionType &&\n539:         (acl.kafkaPrincipal == principal || acl.kafkaPrincipal == AclEntry.WildcardPrincipal) &&\n540:         (operation == acl.operation || acl.operation == AclOperation.ALL) &&\n541:         (acl.host == host || acl.host == AclEntry.WildcardHost)\n542:     }.exists { acl =>\n543:       authorizerLogger.debug(s\"operation = $operation on resource = $resource from host = $host is $permissionType based on acl = $acl\")\n544:       true\n545:     }\n546:   }\n547: \n548:   private def loadCache(): Unit = {\n549:     lock synchronized  {\n550:       ZkAclStore.stores.foreach(store => {\n551:         val resourceTypes = zkClient.getResourceTypes(store.patternType)\n552:         for (rType <- resourceTypes) {\n553:           val resourceType = Try(SecurityUtils.resourceType(rType))\n554:           resourceType match {\n555:             case Success(resourceTypeObj) =>\n556:               val resourceNames = zkClient.getResourceNames(store.patternType, resourceTypeObj)\n557:               for (resourceName <- resourceNames) {\n558:                 val resource = new ResourcePattern(resourceTypeObj, resourceName, store.patternType)\n559:                 val versionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(resource)\n560:                 updateCache(resource, versionedAcls)\n561:               }\n562:             case Failure(_) => warn(s\"Ignoring unknown ResourceType: $rType\")\n563:           }\n564:         }\n565:       })\n566:     }\n567:   }\n568: \n569:   private[authorizer] def startZkChangeListeners(): Unit = {\n570:     aclChangeListeners = ZkAclChangeStore.stores\n571:       .map(store => store.createListener(AclChangedNotificationHandler, zkClient))\n572:   }\n573: \n574:   private def filterToResources(filter: ResourcePatternFilter): Set[ResourcePattern] = {\n575:     filter.patternType match {\n576:       case PatternType.LITERAL | PatternType.PREFIXED =>\n577:         Set(new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, filter.patternType))\n578:       case PatternType.ANY =>\n579:         Set(new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, PatternType.LITERAL),\n580:           new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, PatternType.PREFIXED))\n581:       case _ => throw new IllegalArgumentException(s\"Cannot determine matching resources for patternType $filter\")\n582:     }\n583:   }\n584: \n585:   def logAuditMessage(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action, authorized: Boolean): Unit = {\n586:     def logMessage: String = {\n587:       val principal = requestContext.principal\n588:       val operation = SecurityUtils.operationName(action.operation)\n589:       val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\n590:       val resourceType = SecurityUtils.resourceTypeName(action.resourcePattern.resourceType)\n591:       val resource = s\"$resourceType$ResourceSeparator${action.resourcePattern.patternType}$ResourceSeparator${action.resourcePattern.name}\"\n592:       val authResult = if (authorized) \"Allowed\" else \"Denied\"\n593:       val apiKey = if (ApiKeys.hasId(requestContext.requestType)) ApiKeys.forId(requestContext.requestType).name else requestContext.requestType\n594:       val refCount = action.resourceReferenceCount\n595: \n596:       s\"Principal = $principal is $authResult Operation = $operation \" +\n597:         s\"from host = $host on resource = $resource for request = $apiKey with resourceRefCount = $refCount\"\n598:     }\n599: \n600:     if (authorized) {\n601:       // logIfAllowed is true if access is granted to the resource as a result of this authorization.\n602:       // In this case, log at debug level. If false, no access is actually granted, the result is used\n603:       // only to determine authorized operations. So log only at trace level.\n604:       if (action.logIfAllowed)\n605:         authorizerLogger.debug(logMessage)\n606:       else\n607:         authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\n608:     } else {\n609:       // logIfDenied is true if access to the resource was explicitly requested. Since this is an attempt\n610:       // to access unauthorized resources, log at info level. If false, this is either a request to determine\n611:       // authorized operations or a filter (e.g for regex subscriptions) to filter out authorized resources.\n612:       // In this case, log only at trace level.\n613:       if (action.logIfDenied)\n614:         authorizerLogger.info(logMessage)\n615:       else\n616:         authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\n617:     }\n618:   }\n619: \n620:   /**\n621:     * Safely updates the resources ACLs by ensuring reads and writes respect the expected zookeeper version.\n622:     * Continues to retry until it successfully updates zookeeper.\n623:     *\n624:     * Returns a boolean indicating if the content of the ACLs was actually changed.\n625:     *\n626:     * @param resource the resource to change ACLs for\n627:     * @param getNewAcls function to transform existing acls to new ACLs\n628:     * @return boolean indicating if a change was made\n629:     */\n630:   private def updateResourceAcls(resource: ResourcePattern)(getNewAcls: Set[AclEntry] => Set[AclEntry]): Boolean = {\n631:     var currentVersionedAcls =\n632:       if (aclCache.contains(resource))\n633:         getAclsFromCache(resource)\n634:       else\n635:         getAclsFromZk(resource)\n636:     var newVersionedAcls: VersionedAcls = null\n637:     var writeComplete = false\n638:     var retries = 0\n639:     while (!writeComplete && retries <= maxUpdateRetries) {\n640:       val newAcls = getNewAcls(currentVersionedAcls.acls)\n641:       val (updateSucceeded, updateVersion) =\n642:         if (newAcls.nonEmpty) {\n643:           if (currentVersionedAcls.exists)\n644:             zkClient.conditionalSetAclsForResource(resource, newAcls, currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion)\n645:           else\n646:             zkClient.createAclsForResourceIfNotExists(resource, newAcls)\n647:         } else {\n648:           trace(s\"Deleting path for $resource because it had no ACLs remaining\")\n649:           (zkClient.conditionalDelete(resource, currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion), 0)\n650:         }\n651: \n652:       if (!updateSucceeded) {\n653:         trace(s\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource. Used version ${currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion}. Reading data and retrying update.\")\n654:         Thread.sleep(backoffTime)\n655:         currentVersionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(resource)\n656:         retries += 1\n657:       } else {\n658:         newVersionedAcls = VersionedAcls(newAcls, updateVersion)\n659:         writeComplete = updateSucceeded\n660:       }\n661:     }\n662: \n663:     if (!writeComplete)\n664:       throw new IllegalStateException(s\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource after trying a maximum of $maxUpdateRetries times\")\n665: \n666:     if (newVersionedAcls.acls != currentVersionedAcls.acls) {\n667:       info(s\"Updated ACLs for $resource with new version ${newVersionedAcls.zkVersion}\")\n668:       debug(s\"Updated ACLs for $resource to $newVersionedAcls\")\n669:       updateCache(resource, newVersionedAcls)\n670:       updateAclChangedFlag(resource)\n671:       true\n672:     } else {\n673:       debug(s\"Updated ACLs for $resource, no change was made\")\n674:       updateCache(resource, newVersionedAcls) // Even if no change, update the version\n675:       false\n676:     }\n677:   }\n678: \n679:   private def getAclsFromCache(resource: ResourcePattern): VersionedAcls = {\n680:     aclCache.getOrElse(resource, throw new IllegalArgumentException(s\"ACLs do not exist in the cache for resource $resource\"))\n681:   }\n682: \n683:   private def getAclsFromZk(resource: ResourcePattern): VersionedAcls = {\n684:     zkClient.getVersionedAclsForResource(resource)\n685:   }\n686: \n687:   // Visible for benchmark\n688:   def updateCache(resource: ResourcePattern, versionedAcls: VersionedAcls): Unit = {\n689:     val currentAces: Set[AccessControlEntry] = aclCache.get(resource).map(_.acls.map(_.ace)).getOrElse(Set.empty)\n690:     val newAces: Set[AccessControlEntry] = versionedAcls.acls.map(aclEntry => aclEntry.ace)\n691:     val acesToAdd = newAces.diff(currentAces)\n692:     val acesToRemove = currentAces.diff(newAces)\n693: \n694:     acesToAdd.foreach(ace => {\n695:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(ace, resource.resourceType(), resource.patternType())\n696:       resourceCache.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n697:         case Some(resources) => resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> (resources + resource.name()))\n698:         case None => resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> immutable.HashSet(resource.name()))\n699:       }\n700:     })\n701:     acesToRemove.foreach(ace => {\n702:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(ace, resource.resourceType(), resource.patternType())\n703:       resourceCache.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n704:         case Some(resources) =>\n705:           val newResources = resources - resource.name()\n706:           if (newResources.isEmpty) {\n707:             resourceCache -= resourceTypeKey\n708:           } else {\n709:             resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> newResources)\n710:           }\n711:         case None =>\n712:       }\n713:     })\n714: \n715:     if (versionedAcls.acls.nonEmpty) {\n716:       aclCache = aclCache.updated(resource, versionedAcls)\n717:     } else {\n718:       aclCache -= resource\n719:     }\n720:   }\n721: \n722:   private def updateAclChangedFlag(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\n723:     zkClient.createAclChangeNotification(resource)\n724:   }\n725: \n726:   private def backoffTime = {\n727:     retryBackoffMs + Random.nextInt(retryBackoffJitterMs)\n728:   }\n729: \n730:   private def apiException(e: Throwable): ApiException = {\n731:     e match {\n732:       case e1: ApiException => e1\n733:       case e1 => new ApiException(e1)\n734:     }\n735:   }\n736: \n737:   private[authorizer] def processAclChangeNotification(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\n738:     lock synchronized {\n739:       val versionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(resource)\n740:       info(s\"Processing Acl change notification for $resource, versionedAcls : ${versionedAcls.acls}, zkVersion : ${versionedAcls.zkVersion}\")\n741:       updateCache(resource, versionedAcls)\n742:     }\n743:   }\n744: \n745:   object AclChangedNotificationHandler extends AclChangeNotificationHandler {\n746:     override def processNotification(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\n747:       processAclChangeNotification(resource)\n748:     }\n749:   }\n750: \n751:   private case class ResourceTypeKey(ace: AccessControlEntry,\n752:                                      resourceType: ResourceType,\n753:                                      patternType: PatternType)\n754: }\n755: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sourcegraph-testing/kafka@a61b998c5df7ca9baccc5d966cb1e95108cbdee9/-/blob/core/src/main/scala/kafka/security/authorizer/AclAuthorizer.scala"
  }
}

SaslException(\"Token Authentication failed: Invalid tokenId : \" + username);\n-                            this.authorizationId = tokenCallback.tokenOwner();\n-
