language governing permissions and\\n15:  * limitations under the License.\\n16:  */\\n17: package org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals;\\n18: \\n19: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.AuthenticationException;\\n20: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.IllegalSaslStateException;\\n21: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.SaslAuthenticationException;\\n22: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.authenticator.SaslInternalConfigs;\\n23: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredential;\\n24: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredentialCallback;\\n25: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramLoginModule;\\n26: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFinalMessage;\\n27: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFirstMessage;\\n28: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFinalMessage;\\n29: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFirstMessage;\\n30: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.token.delegation.internals.DelegationTokenCredentialCallback;\\n31: \\n32: import org.slf4j.Logger;\\n33: import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\n34: \\n35: import java.security.InvalidKeyException;\\n36: import java.security.MessageDigest;\\n37: import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;\\n38: import java.util.Collection;\\n39: import java.util.Map;\\n40: import java.util.Set;\\n41: \\n42: import javax.security.auth.callback.Callback;\\n43: import javax.security.auth.callback.CallbackHandler;\\n44: import javax.security.auth.callback.NameCallback;\\n45: import javax.security.sasl.SaslException;\\n46: import javax.security.sasl.SaslServer;\\n47: import javax.security.sasl.SaslServerFactory;\\n48: \\n49: /**\\n50:  * SaslServer implementation for SASL/SCRAM. This server is configured with a callback\\n51:  * handler for integration with a credential manager. Kafka brokers provide callbacks\\n52:  * based on a Zookeeper-based password store.\\n53:  *\\n54:  * @see <a href=\\\"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5802\\\">RFC 5802</a>\\n55:  */\\n56: public class ScramSaslServer implements SaslServer {\\n57: \\n58:     private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ScramSaslServer.class);\\n59:     private static final Set<String> SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS = Set.of(ScramLoginModule.TOKEN_AUTH_CONFIG);\\n60: \\n61:     enum State {\\n62:         RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE,\\n63:         RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE,\\n64:         COMPLETE,\\n65:         FAILED\\n66:     }\\n67: \\n68:     private final ScramMechanism mechanism;\\n69:     private final ScramFormatter formatter;\\n70:     private final CallbackHandler callbackHandler;\\n71:     private State state;\\n72:     private ClientFirstMessage clientFirstMessage;\\n73:     private ServerFirstMessage serverFirstMessage;\\n74:     private ScramExtensions scramExtensions;\\n75:     private ScramCredential scramCredential;\\n76:     private String authorizationId;\\n77:     private Long tokenExpiryTimestamp;\\n78: \\n79:     public ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism mechanism, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler callbackHandler) throws NoSuchAlgorithmException {\\n80:         this.mechanism = mechanism;\\n81:         this.formatter = new ScramFormatter(mechanism);\\n82:         this.callbackHandler = callbackHandler;\\n83:         setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE);\\n84:     }\\n85: \\n86:     /**\\n87:      * @throws SaslAuthenticationException if the requested authorization id is not the same as username.\\n88:      * <p>\\n89:      * <b>Note:</b> This method may throw {@link SaslAuthenticationException} to provide custom error messages\\n90:      * to clients. But care should be taken to avoid including any information in the exception message that\\n91:      * should not be leaked to unauthenticated clients. It may be safer to throw {@link SaslException} in\\n92:      * most cases so that a standard error message is returned to clients.\\n93:      * </p>\\n94:      */\\n95:     @Override\\n96:     public byte[] evaluateResponse(byte[] response) throws SaslException, SaslAuthenticationException {\\n97:         try {\\n98:             switch (state) {\\n99:                 case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE:\\n100:                     this.clientFirstMessage = new ClientFirstMessage(response);\\n101:                     this.scramExtensions = clientFirstMessage.extensions();\\n102:                     if (!SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.containsAll(scramExtensions.map().keySet())) {\\n103:                         log.debug(\\\"Unsupported extensions will be ignored, supported {}, provided {}\\\",\\n104:                                 SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS, scramExtensions.map().keySet());\\n105:                     }\\n106:                     String serverNonce = formatter.secureRandomString();\\n107:                     try {\\n108:                         String saslName = clientFirstMessage.saslName();\\n109:                         String username = ScramFormatter.username(saslName);\\n110:                         NameCallback nameCallback = new NameCallback(\\\"username\\\", username);\\n111:                         ScramCredentialCallback credentialCallback;\\n112:                         if (scramExtensions.tokenAuthenticated()) {\\n113:                             DelegationTokenCredentialCallback tokenCallback = new DelegationTokenCredentialCallback();\\n114:                             credentialCallback = tokenCallback;\\n115:                             callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, tokenCallback});\\n116:                             if (tokenCallback.tokenOwner() == null)\\n117:                                 throw new SaslException(\\\"Token Authentication failed: Invalid tokenId : \\\" + username);\\n118:                             this.authorizationId = tokenCallback.tokenOwner();\\n119:                             this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = tokenCallback.tokenExpiryTimestamp();\\n120:                         } else {\\n121:                             credentialCallback = new ScramCredentialCallback();\\n122:                             callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, credentialCallback});\\n123:                             this.authorizationId = username;\\n124:                             this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = null;\\n125:                         }\\n126:                         this.scramCredential = credentialCallback.scramCredential();\\n127:                         if (scramCredential == null)\\n128:                             throw new SaslException(\\\"Authentication failed: Invalid user credentials\\\");\\n129:                         String authorizationIdFromClient = clientFirstMessage.authorizationId();\\n130:                         if (!authorizationIdFromClient.isEmpty() && !authorizationIdFromClient.equals(username))\\n131:                             throw new SaslAuthenticationException(\\\"Authentication failed: Client requested an authorization id that is different from username\\\");\\n132: \\n133:                         if (scramCredential.iterations() < mechanism.minIterations())\\n134:                             throw new SaslException(\\\"Iterations \\\" + scramCredential.iterations() +  \\\" is less than the minimum \\\" + mechanism.minIterations() + \\\" for \\\" + mechanism);\\n135:                         this.serverFirstMessage = new ServerFirstMessage(clientFirstMessage.nonce(),\\n136:                                 serverNonce,\\n137:                                 scramCredential.salt(),\\n138:                                 scramCredential.iterations());\\n139:                         setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE);\\n140:                         return serverFirstMessage.toBytes();\\n141:                     } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\\n142:                         throw e;\\n143:                     } catch (Throwable e) {\\n144:                         throw new SaslException(\\\"Authentication failed: Credentials could not be obtained\\\", e);\\n145:                     }\\n146: \\n147:                 case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE:\\n148:                     try {\\n149:                         ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage = new ClientFinalMessage(response);\\n150:                         if (!clientFinalMessage.nonce().equals(serverFirstMessage.nonce())) {\\n151:                             throw new SaslException(\\\"Invalid client nonce in the final client message.\\\");\\n152:                         }\\n153:                         verifyClientProof(clientFinalMessage);\\n154:                         byte[] serverKey = scramCredential.serverKey();\\n155:                         byte[] serverSignature = formatter.serverSignature(serverKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\\n156:                         ServerFinalMessage serverFinalMessage = new ServerFinalMessage(null, serverSignature);\\n157:                         clearCredentials();\\n158:                         setState(State.COMPLETE);\\n159:                         return serverFinalMessage.toBytes();\\n160:                     } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\\n161:                         throw new SaslException(\\\"Authentication failed: Invalid client final message\\\", e);\\n162:                     }\\n163: \\n164:                 default:\\n165:                     throw new IllegalSaslStateException(\\\"Unexpected challenge in Sasl server state \\\" + state);\\n166:             }\\n167:         } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\\n168:             clearCredentials();\\n169:             setState(State.FAILED);\\n170:             throw e;\\n171:         }\\n172:     }\\n173: \\n174:     @Override\\n175:     public String getAuthorizationID() {\\n176:         if (!isComplete())\\n177:             throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Authentication exchange has not completed\\\");\\n178:         return authorizationId;\\n179:     }\\n180: \\n181:     @Override\\n182:     public String getMechanismName() {\\n183:         return mechanism.mechanismName();\\n184:     }\\n185: \\n186:     @Override\\n187:     public Object getNegotiatedProperty(String propName) {\\n188:         if (!isComplete())\\n189:             throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Authentication exchange has not completed\\\");\\n190:         if (SaslInternalConfigs.CREDENTIAL_LIFETIME_MS_SASL_NEGOTIATED_PROPERTY_KEY.equals(propName))\\n191:             return tokenExpiryTimestamp; // will be null if token not used\\n192:         if (SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.contains(propName))\\n193:             return scramExtensions.map().get(propName);\\n194:         else\\n195:             return null;\\n196:     }\\n197: \\n198:     @Override\\n199:     public boolean isComplete() {\\n200:         return state == State.COMPLETE;\\n201:     }\\n202: \\n203:     @Override\\n204:     public byte[] unwrap(byte[] incoming, int offset, int len) {\\n205:         if (!isComplete())\\n206:             throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Authentication exchange has not completed\\\");\\n207:         throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"SCRAM supports neither integrity nor privacy\\\");\\n208:     }\\n209: \\n210:     @Override\\n211:     public byte[] wrap(byte[] outgoing, int offset, int len) {\\n212:         if (!isComplete())\\n213:             throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Authentication exchange has not completed\\\");\\n214:         throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"SCRAM supports neither integrity nor privacy\\\");\\n215:     }\\n216: \\n217:     @Override\\n218:     public void dispose() {\\n219:     }\\n220: \\n221:     private void setState(State state) {\\n222:         log.debug(\\\"Setting SASL/{} server state to {}\\\", mechanism, state);\\n223:         this.state = state;\\n224:     }\\n225: \\n226:     // Visible for testing\\n227:     void verifyClientProof(ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage) throws SaslException {\\n228:         try {\\n229:             byte[] expectedStoredKey = scramCredential.storedKey();\\n230:             byte[] clientSignature = formatter.clientSignature(expectedStoredKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\\n231:             byte[] computedStoredKey = formatter.storedKey(clientSignature, clientFinalMessage.proof());\\n232:             if (!MessageDigest.isEqual(computedStoredKey, expectedStoredKey))\\n233:                 throw new SaslException(\\\"Invalid client credentials\\\");\\n234:         } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\\n235:             throw new SaslException(\\\"Sasl client verification failed\\\", e);\\n236:         }\\n237:     }\\n238: \\n239:     private void clearCredentials() {\\n240:         scramCredential = null;\\n241:         clientFirstMessage = null;\\n242:         serverFirstMessage = null;\\n243:     }\\n244: \\n245:     public static class ScramSaslServerFactory implements SaslServerFactory {\\n246: \\n247:         @Override\\n248:         public SaslServer createSaslServer(String mechanism, String protocol, String serverName, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler cbh)\\n249:             throws SaslException {\\n250: \\n251:             if (!ScramMechanism.isScram(mechanism)) {\\n252:                 throw new SaslException(String.format(\\\"Requested mechanism '%s' is not supported. Supported mechanisms are '%s'.\\\",\\n253:                         mechanism, ScramMechanism.mechanismNames()));\\n254:             }\\n255:             try {\\n256:                 return new ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism.forMechanismName(mechanism), props, cbh);\\n257:             } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {\\n258:                 throw new SaslException(\\\"Hash algorithm not supported for mechanism \\\" + mechanism, e);\\n259:             }\\n260:         }\\n261: \\n262:         @Override\\n263:         public String[] getMechanismNames(Map<String, ?> props) {\\n264:             Collection<String> mechanisms = ScramMechanism.mechanismNames();\\n265:             return mechanisms.toArray(new String[0]);\\n266:         }\\n267:     }\\n268: }\\n269: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-benchmarks/kafka--be816b82@7bb066906e7979c9d10cdc924186dfe3f49a9428/-/blob/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/security/scram/internals/ScramSaslServer.java\"}",

governing permissions and\n15:  * limitations under the License.\n16:  */\n17: package org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals;\n18: \n19: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.AuthenticationException;\n20: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.IllegalSaslStateException;\n21: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.SaslAuthenticationException;\n22: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.authenticator.SaslInternalConfigs;\n23: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredential;\n24: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredentialCallback;\n25: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramLoginModule;\n26: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFinalMessage;\n27: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFirstMessage;\n28: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFinalMessage;\n29: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFirstMessage;\n30: import org.apache.kafka.common.security.token.delegation.internals.DelegationTokenCredentialCallback;\n31: \n32: import org.slf4j.Logger;\n33: import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n34: \n35: import java.security.InvalidKeyException;\n36: import java.security.MessageDigest;\n37: import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;\n38: import java.util.Collection;\n39: import java.util.Map;\n40: import java.util.Set;\n41: \n42: import javax.security.auth.callback.Callback;\n43: import javax.security.auth.callback.CallbackHandler;\n44: import javax.security.auth.callback.NameCallback;\n45: import javax.security.sasl.SaslException;\n46: import javax.security.sasl.SaslServer;\n47: import javax.security.sasl.SaslServerFactory;\n48: \n49: /**\n50:  * SaslServer implementation for SASL/SCRAM. This server is configured with a callback\n51:  * handler for integration with a credential manager. Kafka brokers provide callbacks\n52:  * based on a Zookeeper-based password store.\n53:  *\n54:  * @see <a href=\"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5802\">RFC 5802</a>\n55:  */\n56: public class ScramSaslServer implements SaslServer {\n57: \n58:     private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ScramSaslServer.class);\n59:     private static final Set<String> SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS = Set.of(ScramLoginModule.TOKEN_AUTH_CONFIG);\n60: \n61:     enum State {\n62:         RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE,\n63:         RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE,\n64:         COMPLETE,\n65:         FAILED\n66:     }\n67: \n68:     private final ScramMechanism mechanism;\n69:     private final ScramFormatter formatter;\n70:     private final CallbackHandler callbackHandler;\n71:     private State state;\n72:     private ClientFirstMessage clientFirstMessage;\n73:     private ServerFirstMessage serverFirstMessage;\n74:     private ScramExtensions scramExtensions;\n75:     private ScramCredential scramCredential;\n76:     private String authorizationId;\n77:     private Long tokenExpiryTimestamp;\n78: \n79:     public ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism mechanism, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler callbackHandler) throws NoSuchAlgorithmException {\n80:         this.mechanism = mechanism;\n81:         this.formatter = new ScramFormatter(mechanism);\n82:         this.callbackHandler = callbackHandler;\n83:         setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE);\n84:     }\n85: \n86:     /**\n87:      * @throws SaslAuthenticationException if the requested authorization id is not the same as username.\n88:      * <p>\n89:      * <b>Note:</b> This method may throw {@link SaslAuthenticationException} to provide custom error messages\n90:      * to clients. But care should be taken to avoid including any information in the exception message that\n91:      * should not be leaked to unauthenticated clients. It may be safer to throw {@link SaslException} in\n92:      * most cases so that a standard error message is returned to clients.\n93:      * </p>\n94:      */\n95:     @Override\n96:     public byte[] evaluateResponse(byte[] response) throws SaslException, SaslAuthenticationException {\n97:         try {\n98:             switch (state) {\n99:                 case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE:\n100:                     this.clientFirstMessage = new ClientFirstMessage(response);\n101:                     this.scramExtensions = clientFirstMessage.extensions();\n102:                     if (!SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.containsAll(scramExtensions.map().keySet())) {\n103:                         log.debug(\"Unsupported extensions will be ignored, supported {}, provided {}\",\n104:                                 SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS, scramExtensions.map().keySet());\n105:                     }\n106:                     String serverNonce = formatter.secureRandomString();\n107:                     try {\n108:                         String saslName = clientFirstMessage.saslName();\n109:                         String username = ScramFormatter.username(saslName);\n110:                         NameCallback nameCallback = new NameCallback(\"username\", username);\n111:                         ScramCredentialCallback credentialCallback;\n112:                         if (scramExtensions.tokenAuthenticated()) {\n113:                             DelegationTokenCredentialCallback tokenCallback = new DelegationTokenCredentialCallback();\n114:                             credentialCallback = tokenCallback;\n115:                             callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, tokenCallback});\n116:                             if (tokenCallback.tokenOwner() == null)\n117:                                 throw new SaslException(\"Token Authentication failed: Invalid tokenId : \" + username);\n118:                             this.authorizationId = tokenCallback.tokenOwner();\n119:                             this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = tokenCallback.tokenExpiryTimestamp();\n120:                         } else {\n121:                             credentialCallback = new ScramCredentialCallback();\n122:                             callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, credentialCallback});\n123:                             this.authorizationId = username;\n124:                             this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = null;\n125:                         }\n126:                         this.scramCredential = credentialCallback.scramCredential();\n127:                         if (scramCredential == null)\n128:                             throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Invalid user credentials\");\n129:                         String authorizationIdFromClient = clientFirstMessage.authorizationId();\n130:                         if (!authorizationIdFromClient.isEmpty() && !authorizationIdFromClient.equals(username))\n131:                             throw new SaslAuthenticationException(\"Authentication failed: Client requested an authorization id that is different from username\");\n132: \n133:                         if (scramCredential.iterations() < mechanism.minIterations())\n134:                             throw new SaslException(\"Iterations \" + scramCredential.iterations() +  \" is less than the minimum \" + mechanism.minIterations() + \" for \" + mechanism);\n135:                         this.serverFirstMessage = new ServerFirstMessage(clientFirstMessage.nonce(),\n136:                                 serverNonce,\n137:                                 scramCredential.salt(),\n138:                                 scramCredential.iterations());\n139:                         setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE);\n140:                         return serverFirstMessage.toBytes();\n141:                     } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\n142:                         throw e;\n143:                     } catch (Throwable e) {\n144:                         throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Credentials could not be obtained\", e);\n145:                     }\n146: \n147:                 case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE:\n148:                     try {\n149:                         ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage = new ClientFinalMessage(response);\n150:                         if (!clientFinalMessage.nonce().equals(serverFirstMessage.nonce())) {\n151:                             throw new SaslException(\"Invalid client nonce in the final client message.\");\n152:                         }\n153:                         verifyClientProof(clientFinalMessage);\n154:                         byte[] serverKey = scramCredential.serverKey();\n155:                         byte[] serverSignature = formatter.serverSignature(serverKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\n156:                         ServerFinalMessage serverFinalMessage = new ServerFinalMessage(null, serverSignature);\n157:                         clearCredentials();\n158:                         setState(State.COMPLETE);\n159:                         return serverFinalMessage.toBytes();\n160:                     } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\n161:                         throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Invalid client final message\", e);\n162:                     }\n163: \n164:                 default:\n165:                     throw new IllegalSaslStateException(\"Unexpected challenge in Sasl server state \" + state);\n166:             }\n167:         } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\n168:             clearCredentials();\n169:             setState(State.FAILED);\n170:             throw e;\n171:         }\n172:     }\n173: \n174:     @Override\n175:     public String getAuthorizationID() {\n176:         if (!isComplete())\n177:             throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n178:         return authorizationId;\n179:     }\n180: \n181:     @Override\n182:     public String getMechanismName() {\n183:         return mechanism.mechanismName();\n184:     }\n185: \n186:     @Override\n187:     public Object getNegotiatedProperty(String propName) {\n188:         if (!isComplete())\n189:             throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n190:         if (SaslInternalConfigs.CREDENTIAL_LIFETIME_MS_SASL_NEGOTIATED_PROPERTY_KEY.equals(propName))\n191:             return tokenExpiryTimestamp; // will be null if token not used\n192:         if (SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.contains(propName))\n193:             return scramExtensions.map().get(propName);\n194:         else\n195:             return null;\n196:     }\n197: \n198:     @Override\n199:     public boolean isComplete() {\n200:         return state == State.COMPLETE;\n201:     }\n202: \n203:     @Override\n204:     public byte[] unwrap(byte[] incoming, int offset, int len) {\n205:         if (!isComplete())\n206:             throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n207:         throw new IllegalStateException(\"SCRAM supports neither integrity nor privacy\");\n208:     }\n209: \n210:     @Override\n211:     public byte[] wrap(byte[] outgoing, int offset, int len) {\n212:         if (!isComplete())\n213:             throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n214:         throw new IllegalStateException(\"SCRAM supports neither integrity nor privacy\");\n215:     }\n216: \n217:     @Override\n218:     public void dispose() {\n219:     }\n220: \n221:     private void setState(State state) {\n222:         log.debug(\"Setting SASL/{} server state to {}\", mechanism, state);\n223:         this.state = state;\n224:     }\n225: \n226:     // Visible for testing\n227:     void verifyClientProof(ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage) throws SaslException {\n228:         try {\n229:             byte[] expectedStoredKey = scramCredential.storedKey();\n230:             byte[] clientSignature = formatter.clientSignature(expectedStoredKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\n231:             byte[] computedStoredKey = formatter.storedKey(clientSignature, clientFinalMessage.proof());\n232:             if (!MessageDigest.isEqual(computedStoredKey, expectedStoredKey))\n233:                 throw new SaslException(\"Invalid client credentials\");\n234:         } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\n235:             throw new SaslException(\"Sasl client verification failed\", e);\n236:         }\n237:     }\n238: \n239:     private void clearCredentials() {\n240:         scramCredential = null;\n241:         clientFirstMessage = null;\n242:         serverFirstMessage = null;\n243:     }\n244: \n245:     public static class ScramSaslServerFactory implements SaslServerFactory {\n246: \n247:         @Override\n248:         public SaslServer createSaslServer(String mechanism, String protocol, String serverName, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler cbh)\n249:             throws SaslException {\n250: \n251:             if (!ScramMechanism.isScram(mechanism)) {\n252:                 throw new SaslException(String.format(\"Requested mechanism '%s' is not supported. Supported mechanisms are '%s'.\",\n253:                         mechanism, ScramMechanism.mechanismNames()));\n254:             }\n255:             try {\n256:                 return new ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism.forMechanismName(mechanism), props, cbh);\n257:             } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {\n258:                 throw new SaslException(\"Hash algorithm not supported for mechanism \" + mechanism, e);\n259:             }\n260:         }\n261: \n262:         @Override\n263:         public String[] getMechanismNames(Map<String, ?> props) {\n264:             Collection<String> mechanisms = ScramMechanism.mechanismNames();\n265:             return mechanisms.toArray(new String[0]);\n266:         }\n267:     }\n268: }\n269: ",

  }

You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n8:  *\\n9:  *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n10:  *\\n11:  * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n12:  * distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n13:  * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n14:  * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n15:  * limitations under the License.\\n16:  */\\n17: package org.apache.kafka.common.security.authenticator;\\n18: \\n19: import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;\\n20: \\n21: public class CredentialCache {\\n22: \\n23:     private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, Cache<?>> cacheMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\\n24: \\n25:     public <C> Cache<C> createCache(String mechanism, Class<C> credentialClass) {\\n26:         Cache<C> cache = new Cache<>(credentialClass);\\n27:         @SuppressWarnings(\\\"unchecked\\\")\\n28:         Cache<C> oldCache = (Cache<C>) cacheMap.putIfAbsent(mechanism, cache);\\n29:         return oldCache == null ? cache : oldCache;\\n30:     }\\n31: \\n32:     @SuppressWarnings(\\\"unchecked\\\")\\n33:     public <C> Cache<C> cache(String mechanism, Class<C> credentialClass) {\\n34:         Cache<?> cache = cacheMap.get(mechanism);\\n35:         if (cache != null) {\\n36:             if (cache.credentialClass() != credentialClass)\\n37:                 throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Invalid credential class \\\" + credentialClass + \\\", expected \\\" + cache.credentialClass());\\n38:             return (Cache<C>) cache;\\n39:         } else\\n40:             return null;\\n41:     }\\n42: \\n43:     public static class Cache<C> {\\n44:         private final Class<C> credentialClass;\\n45:         private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, C> credentials;\\n46: \\n47:         public Cache(Class<C> credentialClass) {\\n48:             this.credentialClass = credentialClass;\\n49:             this.credentials = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\\n50:         }\\n51: \\n52:         public C get(String username) {\\n53:             return credentials.get(username);\\n54:         }\\n55: \\n56:         public C put(String username, C credential) {\\n57:             return credentials.put(username, credential);\\n58:         }\\n59: \\n60:         public C remove(String username) {\\n61:             return credentials.remove(username);\\n62:         }\\n63: \\n64:         public Class<C> credentialClass() {\\n65:             return credentialClass;\\n66:         }\\n67:     }\\n68: }\\n69: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-benchmarks/kafka--be816b82@7bb066906e7979c9d10cdc924186dfe3f49a9428/-/blob/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/security/authenticator/CredentialCache.java\"}",

cache : oldCache;\n30:     }\n31: \n32:     @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n33:     public <C> Cache<C> cache(String mechanism, Class<C> credentialClass) {\n34:         Cache<?> cache = cacheMap.get(mechanism);\n35:         if (cache != null) {\n36:             if (cache.credentialClass() != credentialClass)\n37:                 throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Invalid credential class \" + credentialClass + \", expected \" + cache.credentialClass());\n38:             return (Cache<C>) cache;\n39:         } else\n40:             return null;\n41:     }\n42: \n43:     public static class Cache<C> {\n44:         private final Class<C> credentialClass;\n45:         private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, C> credentials;\n46: \n47:         public Cache(Class<C> credentialClass) {\n48:             this.credentialClass = credentialClass;\n49:             this.credentials = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n50:         }\n51: \n52:         public C get(String username) {\n53:             return credentials.get(username);\n54:         }\n55: \n56:         public C put(String username, C credential) {\n57:             return credentials.put(username, credential);\n58:         }\n59: \n60:         public C remove(String username) {\n61:             return credentials.remove(username);\n62:         }\n63: \n64:         public Class<C> credentialClass() {\n65:             return credentialClass;\n66:         }\n67:     }\n68: }\n69: ",

javax.security.sasl.SaslServer;\\n92: \\n93: public class SaslServerAuthenticator implements Authenticator {\\n94:     private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SaslServerAuthenticator.class);\\n95: \\n96:     /**\\n97:      * The internal state transitions for initial authentication of a channel on the\\n98:      * server side are declared in order, starting with {@link #INITIAL_REQUEST} and\\n99:      * ending in either {@link #COMPLETE} or {@link #FAILED}.\\n100:      * <p>\\n101:      * Re-authentication of a channel on the server side starts with the state\\n102:      * {@link #REAUTH_PROCESS_HANDSHAKE}. It may then flow to\\n103:      * {@link #REAUTH_BAD_MECHANISM} before a transition to {@link #FAILED} if\\n104:      * re-authentication is attempted with a mechanism different than the original\\n105:      * one; otherwise it joins the authentication flow at the {@link #AUTHENTICATE}\\n106:      * state and likewise ends at either {@link #COMPLETE} or {@link #FAILED}.\\n107:      */\\n108:     private enum SaslState {\\n109:         INITIAL_REQUEST,               // May be SaslHandshake or ApiVersions for authentication\\n110:         HANDSHAKE_OR_VERSIONS_REQUEST, // May be SaslHandshake or ApiVersions\\n111:         HANDSHAKE_REQUEST,             // After an ApiVersions request, next request must be SaslHandshake\\n112:         AUTHENTICATE,                  // Authentication tokens (SaslHandshake v1 and above indicate SaslAuthenticate headers)\\n113:         COMPLETE,                      // Authentication completed successfully\\n114:         FAILED,                        // Authentication failed\\n115:         REAUTH_PROCESS_HANDSHAKE,      // Initial state for re-authentication, processes SASL handshake request\\n116:         REAUTH_BAD_MECHANISM,          // When re-authentication requested with wrong mechanism, generate exception\\n117:     }\\n118: \\n119:     private final SecurityProtocol securityProtocol;\\n120:     private final ListenerName listenerName;\\n121:     private final String connectionId;\\n122:     private final Map<String, Subject> subjects;\\n123:     private final TransportLayer transportLayer;\\n124:     private final List<String> enabledMechanisms;\\n125:     private final Map<String, ?> configs;\\n126:     private final KafkaPrincipalBuilder principalBuilder;\\n127:     private final Map<String, AuthenticateCallbackHandler> callbackHandlers;\\n128:     private final Map<String, Long> connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism;\\n129:     private final Time time;\\n130:     private final ReauthInfo reauthInfo;\\n131:     private final ChannelMetadataRegistry metadataRegistry;\\n132:     private final Function<Short, ApiVersionsResponse> apiVersionSupplier;\\n133: \\n134:     // Current SASL state\\n135:     private SaslState saslState = SaslState.INITIAL_REQUEST;\\n136:     // Next SASL state to be set when outgoing writes associated with the current SASL state complete\\n137:     private SaslState pendingSaslState = null;\\n138:     // Exception that will be thrown by `authenticate()` when SaslState is set to FAILED after outbound writes complete\\n139:     private AuthenticationException pendingException = null;\\n140:     private SaslServer saslServer;\\n141:     private String saslMechanism;\\n142: \\n143:     // buffers used in `authenticate`\\n144:     private Integer saslAuthRequestMaxReceiveSize;\\n145:     private NetworkReceive netInBuffer;\\n146:     private Send netOutBuffer;\\n147:     private Send authenticationFailureSend = null;\\n148:     // flag indicating if sasl tokens are sent as Kafka SaslAuthenticate request/responses\\n149:     private boolean enableKafkaSaslAuthenticateHeaders;\\n150: \\n151:     public SaslServerAuthenticator(Map<String, ?> configs,\\n152:                                    Map<String, AuthenticateCallbackHandler> callbackHandlers,\\n153:                                    String connectionId,\\n154:                                    Map<String, Subject> subjects,\\n155:                                    KerberosShortNamer kerberosNameParser,\\n156:                                    ListenerName listenerName,\\n157:                                    SecurityProtocol securityProtocol,\\n158:                                    TransportLayer transportLayer,\\n159:                                    Map<String, Long> connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism,\\n160:                                    ChannelMetadataRegistry metadataRegistry,\\n161:                                    Time time,\\n162:                                    Function<Short, ApiVersionsResponse> apiVersionSupplier) {\\n163:         this.callbackHandlers = callbackHandlers;\\n164:         this.connectionId = connectionId;\\n165:         this.subjects = subjects;\\n166:         this.listenerName = listenerName;\\n167:         this.securityProtocol = securityProtocol;\\n168:         this.enableKafkaSaslAuthenticateHeaders = false;\\n169:         this.transportLayer = transportLayer;\\n170:         this.connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism = connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism;\\n171:         this.time = time;\\n172:         this.reauthInfo = new ReauthInfo();\\n173:         this.metadataRegistry = metadataRegistry;\\n174:         this.apiVersionSupplier = apiVersionSupplier;\\n175: \\n176:         this.configs = configs;\\n177:         @SuppressWarnings(\\\"unchecked\\\")\\n178:         List<String> enabledMechanisms = (List<String>) this.configs.get(BrokerSecurityConfigs.SASL_ENABLED_MECHANISMS_CONFIG);\\n179:         if (enabledMechanisms == null || enabledMechanisms.isEmpty())\\n180:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"No SASL mechanisms are enabled\\\");\\n181:         this.enabledMechanisms = new ArrayList<>(new HashSet<>(enabledMechanisms));\\n182:         for (String mechanism : this.enabledMechanisms) {\\n183:             if (!callbackHandlers.containsKey(mechanism))\\n184:                 throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Callback handler not specified for SASL mechanism \\\" + mechanism);\\n185:             if (!subjects.containsKey(mechanism))\\n186:                 throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Subject cannot be null for SASL mechanism \\\" + mechanism);\\n187:             LOG.trace(\\\"{} for mechanism={}: {}\\\", BrokerSecurityConfigs.CONNECTIONS_MAX_REAUTH_MS_CONFIG, mechanism,\\n188:                     connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism.get(mechanism));\\n189:         }\\n190: \\n191:         // Note that the old principal builder does not support SASL, so we do not need to pass the\\n192:         // authenticator or the transport layer\\n193:         this.principalBuilder = ChannelBuilders.createPrincipalBuilder(configs, kerberosNameParser, null);\\n194: \\n195:         saslAuthRequestMaxReceiveSize = (Integer) configs.get(BrokerSecurityConfigs.SASL_SERVER_MAX_RECEIVE_SIZE_CONFIG);\\n196:         if (saslAuthRequestMaxReceiveSize == null)\\n197:             saslAuthRequestMaxReceiveSize = BrokerSecurityConfigs.DEFAULT_SASL_SERVER_MAX_RECEIVE_SIZE;\\n198:     }\\n199: \\n200:     private void createSaslServer(String mechanism) throws IOException {\\n201:         this.saslMechanism = mechanism;\\n202:         Subject subject = subjects.get(mechanism);\\n203:         final AuthenticateCallbackHandler callbackHandler = callbackHandlers.get(mechanism);\\n204:         if (mechanism.equals(SaslConfigs.GSSAPI_MECHANISM)) {\\n205:             saslServer = createSaslKerberosServer(callbackHandler, configs, subject);\\n206:         } else {\\n207:             try {\\n208:                 saslServer = SecurityManagerCompatibility.get().callAs(subject, () ->\\n209:                     Sasl.createSaslServer(saslMechanism, \\\"kafka\\\", serverAddress().getHostName(), configs, callbackHandler));\\n210:                 if (saslServer == null) {\\n211:                     throw new SaslException(\\\"Kafka Server failed to create a SaslServer to interact with a client during session authentication with server mechanism \\\" + saslMechanism);\\n212:                 }\\n213:             } catch (CompletionException e) {\\n214:                 throw new SaslException(\\\"Kafka Server failed to create a SaslServer to interact with a client during session authentication with server mechanism \\\" + saslMechanism, e.getCause());\\n215:             }\\n216:         }\\n217:     }\\n218: \\n219:     private SaslServer createSaslKerberosServer(final AuthenticateCallbackHandler saslServerCallbackHandler, final Map<String, ?> configs, Subject subject) throws IOException {\\n220:         // server is using a JAAS-authenticated subject: determine service principal name and hostname from kafka server's subject.\\n221:         final String servicePrincipal = SaslClientAuthenticator.firstPrincipal(subject);\\n222:         KerberosName kerberosName;\\n223:         try {\\n224:             kerberosName = KerberosName.parse(servicePrincipal);\\n225:         } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\\n226:             throw new KafkaException(\\\"Principal has name with unexpected format \\\" + servicePrincipal);\\n227:         }\\n228:         final String servicePrincipalName = kerberosName.serviceName();\\n229:         final String serviceHostname = kerberosName.hostName();\\n230: \\n231:         LOG.debug(\\\"Creating SaslServer for {} with mechanism {}\\\", kerberosName, saslMechanism);\\n232: \\n233:         try {\\n234:             return SecurityManagerCompatibility.get().callAs(subject, () ->\\n235:                     Sasl.createSaslServer(saslMechanism, servicePrincipalName, serviceHostname, configs, saslServerCallbackHandler));\\n236:         } catch (CompletionException e) {\\n237:             throw new SaslException(\\\"Kafka Server failed to create a SaslServer to interact with a client during session authentication\\\", e.getCause());\\n238:         }\\n239:     }\\n240: \\n241:     /**\\n242:      * Evaluates client responses via `SaslServer.evaluateResponse` and returns the issued challenge to the client until\\n243:      * authentication succeeds or fails.\\n244:      *\\n245:      * The messages are sent and received as size delimited bytes that consists of a 4 byte network-ordered size N\\n246:      * followed by N bytes representing the opaque payload.\\n247:      */\\n248:     @SuppressWarnings(\\\"fallthrough\\\")\\n249:     @Override\\n250:     public void authenticate() throws IOException {\\n251:         if (saslState != SaslState.REAUTH_PROCESS_HANDSHAKE) {\\n252:             if (netOutBuffer != null && !flushNetOutBufferAndUpdateInterestOps())\\n253:                 return;\\n254: \\n255:             if (saslServer != null && saslServer.isComplete()) {\\n256:                 setSaslState(SaslState.COMPLETE);\\n257:                 return;\\n258:             }\\n259: \\n260:             // allocate on heap (as opposed to any socket server memory pool)\\n261:             if (netInBuffer == null) netInBuffer = new NetworkReceive(saslAuthRequestMaxReceiveSize, connectionId);\\n262: \\n263:             try {\\n264:                 netInBuffer.readFrom(transportLayer);\\n265:             } catch (InvalidReceiveException e) {\\n266:                 throw new SaslAuthenticationException(\\\"Failing SASL authentication due to invalid receive size\\\", e);\\n267:             }\\n268:             if (!netInBuffer.complete())\\n269:                 return;\\n270:             netInBuffer.payload().rewind();\\n271:         }\\n272:         byte[] clientToken = new byte[netInBuffer.payload().remaining()];\\n273:         netInBuffer.payload().get(clientToken, 0, clientToken.length);\\n274:         netInBuffer = null; // reset the networkReceive as we read all the data.\\n275:         try {\\n276:             switch (saslState) {\\n277:                 case REAUTH_PROCESS_HANDSHAKE:\\n278:                 case HANDSHAKE_OR_VERSIONS_REQUEST:\\n279:                 case HANDSHAKE_REQUEST:\\n280:                 case INITIAL_REQUEST:\\n281:                     handleKafkaRequest(clientToken);\\n282:                     break;\\n283:                 case REAUTH_BAD_MECHANISM:\\n284:                     throw new SaslAuthenticationException(reauthInfo.badMechanismErrorMessage);\\n285:                 case AUTHENTICATE:\\n286:                     handleSaslToken(clientToken);\\n287:                     // When the authentication exchange is complete and no more tokens are expected from the client,\\n288:                     // update SASL state. Current SASL state will be updated when outgoing writes to the client complete.\\n289:                     if (saslServer.isComplete())\\n290:                         setSaslState(SaslState.COMPLETE);\\n291:                     break;\\n292:                 default:\\n293:                     break;\\n294:             }\\n295:         } catch (AuthenticationException e) {\\n296:             // Exception will be propagated after response is sent to client\\n297:             setSaslState(SaslState.FAILED, e);\\n298:         } catch (Exception e) {\\n299:             // In the case of IOExceptions and other unexpected exceptions, fail immediately\\n300:             saslState = SaslState.FAILED;\\n301:             LOG.debug(\\\"Failed during {}: {}\\\", reauthInfo.authenticationOrReauthenticationText(), e.getMessage());\\n302:             throw e;\\n303:         }\\n304:     }\\n305: \\n306:     @Override\\n307:     public KafkaPrincipal principal() {\\n308:         Optional<SSLSession> sslSession = transportLayer instanceof SslTransportLayer ?\\n309:                 Optional.of(((SslTransportLayer) transportLayer).sslSession()) : Optional.empty();\\n310:         SaslAuthenticationContext context = new SaslAuthenticationContext(saslServer, securityProtocol,\\n311:                 clientAddress(), listenerName.value(), sslSession);\\n312:         KafkaPrincipal principal = principalBuilder.build(context);\\n313:         if (ScramMechanism.isScram(saslMechanism) && Boolean.parseBoolean((String) saslServer.getNegotiatedProperty(ScramLoginModule.TOKEN_AUTH_CONFIG))) {\\n314:             principal.tokenAuthenticated(true);\\n315:         }\\n316:         return principal;\\n317:     }\\n318: \\n319:     @Override\\n320:     public Optional<KafkaPrincipalSerde> principalSerde() {\\n321:         return principalBuilder instanceof KafkaPrincipalSerde ? Optional.of((KafkaPrincipalSerde) principalBuilder) : Optional.empty();\\n322:     }\\n323: \\n324:     @Override\\n325:     public boolean complete() {\\n326:         return saslState == SaslState.COMPLETE;\\n327:     }\\n328: \\n329:     @Override\\n330:     public void handleAuthenticationFailure() throws IOException {\\n331:         sendAuthenticationFailureResponse();\\n332:     }\\n333: \\n334:     @Override\\n335:     public void close() throws IOException {\\n336:         if (principalBuilder instanceof Closeable)\\n337:             Utils.closeQuietly((Closeable) principalBuilder, \\\"principal builder\\\");\\n338:         if (saslServer != null)\\n339:             saslServer.dispose();\\n340:     }\\n341: \\n342:     @Override\\n343:     public void reauthenticate(ReauthenticationContext reauthenticationContext) throws IOException {\\n344:         NetworkReceive saslHandshakeReceive = reauthenticationContext.networkReceive();\\n345:         if (saslHandshakeReceive == null)\\n346:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\n347:                     \\\"Invalid saslHandshakeReceive in server-side re-authentication context: null\\\");\\n348:         SaslServerAuthenticator previousSaslServerAuthenticator = (SaslServerAuthenticator) reauthenticationContext.previousAuthenticator();\\n349:         reauthInfo.reauthenticating(previousSaslServerAuthenticator.saslMechanism,\\n350:                 previousSaslServerAuthenticator.principal(), reauthenticationContext.reauthenticationBeginNanos());\\n351:         previousSaslServerAuthenticator.close();\\n352:         netInBuffer = saslHandshakeReceive;\\n353:         LOG.debug(\\\"Beginning re-authentication: {}\\\", this);\\n354:         netInBuffer.payload().rewind();\\n355:         setSaslState(SaslState.REAUTH_PROCESS_HANDSHAKE);\\n356:         authenticate();\\n357:     }\\n358: \\n359:     @Override\\n360:     public Long serverSessionExpirationTimeNanos() {\\n361:         return reauthInfo.sessionExpirationTimeNanos;\\n362:     }\\n363: \\n364:     @Override\\n365:     public Long reauthenticationLatencyMs() {\\n366:         return reauthInfo.reauthenticationLatencyMs();\\n367:     }\\n368: \\n369:     @Override\\n370:     public boolean connectedClientSupportsReauthentication() {\\n371:         return reauthInfo.connectedClientSupportsReauthentication;\\n372:     }\\n373: \\n374:     private void setSaslState(SaslState saslState) {\\n375:         setSaslState(saslState, null);\\n376:     }\\n377: \\n378:     private void setSaslState(SaslState saslState, AuthenticationException exception) {\\n379:         if (netOutBuffer != null && !netOutBuffer.completed()) {\\n380:             pendingSaslState = saslState;\\n381:             pendingException = exception;\\n382:         } else {\\n383:             this.saslState = saslState;\\n384:             LOG.debug(\\\"Set SASL server state to {} during {}\\\", saslState, reauthInfo.authenticationOrReauthenticationText());\\n385:             this.pendingSaslState = null;\\n386:             this.pendingException = null;\\n387:             if (exception != null)\\n388:                 throw exception;\\n389:         }\\n390:     }\\n391: \\n392:     private boolean flushNetOutBufferAndUpdateInterestOps() throws IOException {\\n393:         boolean flushedCompletely = flushNetOutBuffer();\\n394:         if (flushedCompletely) {\\n395:             transportLayer.removeInterestOps(SelectionKey.OP_WRITE);\\n396:             if (pendingSaslState != null)\\n397:                 setSaslState(pendingSaslState, pendingException);\\n398:         } else\\n399:             transportLayer.addInterestOps(SelectionKey.OP_WRITE);\\n400:         return flushedCompletely;\\n401:     }\\n402: \\n403:     private boolean flushNetOutBuffer() throws IOException {\\n404:         if (!netOutBuffer.completed())\\n405:             netOutBuffer.writeTo(transportLayer);\\n406:         return netOutBuffer.completed();\\n407:     }\\n408: \\n409:     private InetAddress serverAddress() {\\n410:         return transportLayer.socketChannel().socket().getLocalAddress();\\n411:     }\\n412: \\n413:     private InetAddress clientAddress() {\\n414:         return transportLayer.socketChannel().socket().getInetAddress();\\n415:     }\\n416: \\n417:     private int clientPort() {\\n418:         return transportLayer.socketChannel().socket().getPort();\\n419:     }\\n420: \\n421:     private void handleSaslToken(byte[] clientToken) throws IOException {\\n422:         if (!enableKafkaSaslAuthenticateHeaders) {\\n423:             byte[] response = saslServer.evaluateResponse(clientToken);\\n424:             if (saslServer.isComplete()) {\\n425:                 reauthInfo.calcCompletionTimesAndReturnSessionLifetimeMs();\\n426:                 if (reauthInfo.reauthenticating())\\n427:                     reauthInfo.ensurePrincipalUnchanged(principal());\\n428:             }\\n429:             if (response != null) {\\n430:                 netOutBuffer = ByteBufferSend.sizePrefixed(ByteBuffer.wrap(response));\\n431:                 flushNetOutBufferAndUpdateInterestOps();\\n432:             }\\n433:         } else {\\n434:             ByteBuffer requestBuffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(clientToken);\\n435:             RequestHeader header = RequestHeader.parse(requestBuffer);\\n436:             ApiKeys apiKey = header.apiKey();\\n437:             RequestContext requestContext = new RequestContext(header, connectionId, clientAddress(), Optional.of(clientPort()),\\n438:                     KafkaPrincipal.ANONYMOUS, listenerName, securityProtocol, ClientInformation.EMPTY, false);\\n439:             RequestAndSize requestAndSize = requestContext.parseRequest(requestBuffer);\\n440:             if (apiKey != ApiKeys.SASL_AUTHENTICATE) {\\n441:                 IllegalSaslStateException e = new IllegalSaslStateException(\\\"Unexpected Kafka request of type \\\" + apiKey + \\\" during SASL authentication.\\\");\\n442:                 buildResponseOnAuthenticateFailure(requestContext, requestAndSize.request.getErrorResponse(e));\\n443:                 throw e;\\n444:             }\\n445:             short version = header.apiVersion();\\n446:             if (!header.isApiVersionSupported()) {\\n447:                 // We cannot create an error response if the request version of SaslAuthenticate is not supported\\n448:                 // This should not normally occur since clients typically check supported versions using ApiVersionsRequest\\n449:                 throw new UnsupportedVersionException(\\\"Version \\\" + version + \\\" is not supported for apiKey \\\" + apiKey);\\n450:             }\\n451:             /*\\n452:              * The client sends multiple SASL_AUTHENTICATE requests, and the client is known\\n453:              * to support the required version if any one of them indicates it supports that\\n454:              * version.\\n455:              */\\n456:             if (!reauthInfo.connectedClientSupportsReauthentication)\\n457:                 reauthInfo.connectedClientSupportsReauthentication = version > 0;\\n458:             SaslAuthenticateRequest saslAuthenticateRequest = (SaslAuthenticateRequest) requestAndSize.request;\\n459: \\n460:             try {\\n461:                 byte[] responseToken = saslServer.evaluateResponse(\\n462:                         Utils.copyArray(saslAuthenticateRequest.data().authBytes()));\\n463:                 if (reauthInfo.reauthenticating() && saslServer.isComplete())\\n464:                     reauthInfo.ensurePrincipalUnchanged(principal());\\n465:                 // For versions with SASL_AUTHENTICATE header, send a response to SASL_AUTHENTICATE request even if token is empty.\\n466:                 byte[] responseBytes = responseToken == null ? new byte[0] : responseToken;\\n467:                 long sessionLifetimeMs = !saslServer.isComplete() ? 0L\\n468:                         : reauthInfo.calcCompletionTimesAndReturnSessionLifetimeMs();\\n469:                 sendKafkaResponse(requestContext, new SaslAuthenticateResponse(\\n470:                         new SaslAuthenticateResponseData()\\n471:                         .setErrorCode(Errors.NONE.code())\\n472:                         .setAuthBytes(responseBytes)\\n473:                         .setSessionLifetimeMs(sessionLifetimeMs)));\\n474:             } catch (SaslAuthenticationException e) {\\n475:                 buildResponseOnAuthenticateFailure(requestContext,\\n476:                         new SaslAuthenticateResponse(\\n477:                                 new SaslAuthenticateResponseData()\\n478:                                 .setErrorCode(Errors.SASL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED.code())\\n479:                                 .setErrorMessage(e.getMessage())));\\n480:                 throw e;\\n481:             } catch (SaslException e) {\\n482:                 KerberosError kerberosError = KerberosError.fromException(e);\\n483:                 if (kerberosError != null && kerberosError.retriable()) {\\n484:                     // Handle retriable Kerberos exceptions as I/O exceptions rather than authentication exceptions\\n485:                     throw e;\\n486:                 } else {\\n487:                     // DO NOT include error message from the `SaslException` in the client response since it may\\n488:                     // contain sensitive data like the existence of the user.\\n489:                     String errorMessage = \\\"Authentication failed during \\\"\\n490:                             + reauthInfo.authenticationOrReauthenticationText()\\n491:                             + \\\" due to invalid credentials with SASL mechanism \\\" + saslMechanism;\\n492:                     buildResponseOnAuthenticateFailure(requestContext, new SaslAuthenticateResponse(\\n493:                             new SaslAuthenticateResponseData()\\n494:                             .setErrorCode(Errors.SASL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED.code())\\n495:                             .setErrorMessage(errorMessage)));\\n496:                     throw new SaslAuthenticationException(errorMessage, e);\\n497:                 }\\n498:             }\\n499:         }\\n500:     }\\n501: \\n502:     /**\\n503:      * @throws InvalidRequestException if the request is not in Kafka format or if the API key is invalid. Clients\\n504:      * that support SASL without support for KIP-43 (e.g. Kafka Clients 0.9.x) are in the former bucket - the first\\n505:      * packet such clients send is a GSSAPI token starting with 0x60.\\n506:      */\\n507:     private void handleKafkaRequest(byte[] requestBytes) throws IOException, AuthenticationException {\\n508:         try {\\n509:             ByteBuffer requestBuffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(requestBytes);\\n510:             RequestHeader header = RequestHeader.parse(requestBuffer);\\n511:             ApiKeys apiKey = header.apiKey();\\n512: \\n513:             // Raise an error prior to parsing if the api cannot be handled at this layer. This avoids\\n514:             // unnecessary exposure to some of the more complex schema types.\\n515:             if (apiKey != ApiKeys.API_VERSIONS && apiKey != ApiKeys.SASL_HANDSHAKE)\\n516:                 throw new InvalidRequestException(\\\"Unexpected Kafka request of type \\\" + apiKey + \\\" during SASL handshake.\\\");\\n517: \\n518:             LOG.debug(\\\"Handling Kafka request {} during {}\\\", apiKey, reauthInfo.authenticationOrReauthenticationText());\\n519: \\n520:             RequestContext requestContext = new RequestContext(header, connectionId, clientAddress(), Optional.of(clientPort()),\\n521:                     KafkaPrincipal.ANONYMOUS, listenerName, securityProtocol, ClientInformation.EMPTY, false);\\n522:             RequestAndSize requestAndSize = requestContext.parseRequest(requestBuffer);\\n523: \\n524:             // A valid Kafka request was received, we can now update the sasl state\\n525:             if (saslState == SaslState.INITIAL_REQUEST)\\n526:                 setSaslState(SaslState.HANDSHAKE_OR_VERSIONS_REQUEST);\\n527: \\n528:             if (apiKey == ApiKeys.API_VERSIONS)\\n529:                 handleApiVersionsRequest(requestContext, (ApiVersionsRequest) requestAndSize.request);\\n530:             else {\\n531:                 String clientMechanism = handleHandshakeRequest(requestContext, (SaslHandshakeRequest) requestAndSize.request);\\n532:                 if (!reauthInfo.reauthenticating() || reauthInfo.saslMechanismUnchanged(clientMechanism)) {\\n533:                     createSaslServer(clientMechanism);\\n534:                     setSaslState(SaslState.AUTHENTICATE);\\n535:                 }\\n536:             }\\n537:         } catch (InvalidRequestException e) {\\n538:             if (saslState == SaslState.INITIAL_REQUEST) {\\n539:                 // InvalidRequestException is thrown if the request is not in Kafka format or if the API key is invalid.\\n540:                 // If it's the initial request, this could be an ancient client (see method documentation for more details),\\n541:                 // a client configured with the wrong security protocol or a non kafka-client altogether (eg http client).\\n542:                 throw new InvalidRequestException(\\\"Invalid request, potential reasons: kafka client configured with the \\\" +\\n543:                     \\\"wrong security protocol, it does not support KIP-43 or it is not a kafka client.\\\", e);\\n544:             }\\n545:             throw e;\\n546:         }\\n547:     }\\n548: \\n549:     private String handleHandshakeRequest(RequestContext context, SaslHandshakeRequest handshakeRequest) throws IOException, UnsupportedSaslMechanismException {\\n550:         String clientMechanism = handshakeRequest.data().mechanism();\\n551:         short version = context.header.apiVersion();\\n552:         if (version >= 1)\\n553:             this.enableKafkaSaslAuthenticateHeaders(true);\\n554:         if (enabledMechanisms.contains(clientMechanism)) {\\n555:             LOG.debug(\\\"Using SASL mechanism '{}' provided by client\\\", clientMechanism);\\n556:             sendKafkaResponse(context, new SaslHandshakeResponse(\\n557:                     new SaslHandshakeResponseData().setErrorCode(Errors.NONE.code()).setMechanisms(enabledMechanisms)));\\n558:             return clientMechanism;\\n559:         } else {\\n560:             LOG.debug(\\\"SASL mechanism '{}' requested by client is not supported\\\", clientMechanism);\\n561:             buildResponseOnAuthenticateFailure(context, new SaslHandshakeResponse(\\n562:                     new SaslHandshakeResponseData().setErrorCode(Errors.UNSUPPORTED_SASL_MECHANISM.code()).setMechanisms(enabledMechanisms)));\\n563:             throw new UnsupportedSaslMechanismException(\\\"Unsupported SASL mechanism \\\" + clientMechanism);\\n564:         }\\n565:     }\\n566: \\n567:     // Visible to override for testing\\n568:     protected void enableKafkaSaslAuthenticateHeaders(boolean flag) {\\n569:         this.enableKafkaSaslAuthenticateHeaders = flag;\\n570:     }\\n571: \\n572:     private void handleApiVersionsRequest(RequestContext context, ApiVersionsRequest apiVersionsRequest) throws IOException {\\n573:         if (saslState != SaslState.HANDSHAKE_OR_VERSIONS_REQUEST)\\n574:             throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"Unexpected ApiVersions request received during SASL authentication state \\\" + saslState);\\n575: \\n576:         if (apiVersionsRequest.hasUnsupportedRequestVersion())\\n577:             sendKafkaResponse(context, apiVersionsRequest.getErrorResponse(0, Errors.UNSUPPORTED_VERSION.exception()));\\n578:         else if (!apiVersionsRequest.isValid())\\n579:             sendKafkaResponse(context, apiVersionsRequest.getErrorResponse(0, Errors.INVALID_REQUEST.exception()));\\n580:         else {\\n581:             metadataRegistry.registerClientInformation(new ClientInformation(apiVersionsRequest.data().clientSoftwareName(),\\n582:                 apiVersionsRequest.data().clientSoftwareVersion()));\\n583:             sendKafkaResponse(context, apiVersionSupplier.apply(apiVersionsRequest.version()));\\n584:             setSaslState(SaslState.HANDSHAKE_REQUEST);\\n585:         }\\n586:     }\\n587: \\n588:     /**\\n589:      * Build a {@link Send} response on {@link #authenticate()} failure. The actual response is sent out when\\n590:      * {@link #sendAuthenticationFailureResponse()} is called.\\n591:      */\\n592:     private void buildResponseOnAuthenticateFailure(RequestContext context, AbstractResponse response) {\\n593:         authenticationFailureSend = context.buildResponseSend(response);\\n594:     }\\n595: \\n596:     /**\\n597:      * Send any authentication failure response that may have been previously built.\\n598:      */\\n599:     private void sendAuthenticationFailureResponse() throws IOException {\\n600:         if (authenticationFailureSend == null)\\n601:             return;\\n602:         sendKafkaResponse(authenticationFailureSend);\\n603:         authenticationFailureSend = null;\\n604:     }\\n605: \\n606:     private void sendKafkaResponse(RequestContext context, AbstractResponse response) throws IOException {\\n607:         sendKafkaResponse(context.buildResponseSend(response));\\n608:     }\\n609: \\n610:     private void sendKafkaResponse(Send send) throws IOException {\\n611:         netOutBuffer = send;\\n612:         flushNetOutBufferAndUpdateInterestOps();\\n613:     }\\n614: \\n615:     /**\\n616:      * Information related to re-authentication\\n617:      */\\n618:     private class ReauthInfo {\\n619:         public String previousSaslMechanism;\\n620:         public KafkaPrincipal previousKafkaPrincipal;\\n621:         public long reauthenticationBeginNanos;\\n622:         public Long sessionExpirationTimeNanos;\\n623:         public boolean connectedClientSupportsReauthentication;\\n624:         public long authenticationEndNanos;\\n625:         public String badMechanismErrorMessage;\\n626: \\n627:         public void reauthenticating(String previousSaslMechanism, KafkaPrincipal previousKafkaPrincipal,\\n628:                 long reauthenticationBeginNanos) {\\n629:             this.previousSaslMechanism = Objects.requireNonNull(previousSaslMechanism);\\n630:             this.previousKafkaPrincipal = Objects.requireNonNull(previousKafkaPrincipal);\\n631:             this.reauthenticationBeginNanos = reauthenticationBeginNanos;\\n632:         }\\n633: \\n634:         public boolean reauthenticating() {\\n635:             return previousSaslMechanism != null;\\n636:         }\\n637: \\n638:         public String authenticationOrReauthenticationText() {\\n639:             return reauthenticating() ? \\\"re-authentication\\\" : \\\"authentication\\\";\\n640:         }\\n641: \\n642:         public void ensurePrincipalUnchanged(KafkaPrincipal reauthenticatedKafkaPrincipal) throws SaslAuthenticationException {\\n643:             if (!previousKafkaPrincipal.equals(reauthenticatedKafkaPrincipal)) {\\n644:                 throw new SaslAuthenticationException(String.format(\\n645:                         \\\"Cannot change principals during re-authentication from %s.%s: %s.%s\\\",\\n646:                         previousKafkaPrincipal.getPrincipalType(), previousKafkaPrincipal.getName(),\\n647:                         reauthenticatedKafkaPrincipal.getPrincipalType(), reauthenticatedKafkaPrincipal.getName()));\\n648:             }\\n649:         }\\n650: \\n651:         /*\\n652:          * We define the REAUTH_BAD_MECHANISM state because the failed re-authentication\\n653:          * metric does not get updated if we send back an error immediately upon the\\n654:          * start of re-authentication.\\n655:          */\\n656:         public boolean saslMechanismUnchanged(String clientMechanism) {\\n657:             if (previousSaslMechanism.equals(clientMechanism))\\n658:                 return true;\\n659:             badMechanismErrorMessage = String.format(\\n660:                     \\\"SASL mechanism '%s' requested by client is not supported for re-authentication of mechanism '%s'\\\",\\n661:                     clientMechanism, previousSaslMechanism);\\n662:             LOG.debug(badMechanismErrorMessage);\\n663:             setSaslState(SaslState.REAUTH_BAD_MECHANISM);\\n664:             return false;\\n665:         }\\n666: \\n667:         private long calcCompletionTimesAndReturnSessionLifetimeMs() {\\n668:             long retvalSessionLifetimeMs = 0L;\\n669:             long authenticationEndMs = time.milliseconds();\\n670:             authenticationEndNanos = time.nanoseconds();\\n671:             Long credentialExpirationMs = (Long) saslServer\\n672:                     .getNegotiatedProperty(SaslInternalConfigs.CREDENTIAL_LIFETIME_MS_SASL_NEGOTIATED_PROPERTY_KEY);\\n673:             Long connectionsMaxReauthMs = connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism.get(saslMechanism);\\n674:             boolean maxReauthSet = connectionsMaxReauthMs != null && connectionsMaxReauthMs > 0;\\n675: \\n676:             if (credentialExpirationMs != null || maxReauthSet) {\\n677:                 if (credentialExpirationMs == null)\\n678:                     retvalSessionLifetimeMs = zeroIfNegative(connectionsMaxReauthMs);\\n679:                 else if (!maxReauthSet)\\n680:                     retvalSessionLifetimeMs = zeroIfNegative(credentialExpirationMs - authenticationEndMs);\\n681:                 else\\n682:                     retvalSessionLifetimeMs = zeroIfNegative(Math.min(credentialExpirationMs - authenticationEndMs, connectionsMaxReauthMs));\\n683: \\n684:                 sessionExpirationTimeNanos = authenticationEndNanos + 1000 * 1000 * retvalSessionLifetimeMs;\\n685:             }\\n686: \\n687:             if (credentialExpirationMs != null) {\\n688:                 LOG.debug(\\n689:                         \\\"Authentication complete; session max lifetime from broker config={} ms, credential expiration={} ({} ms); session expiration = {} ({} ms), sending {} ms to client\\\",\\n690:                         connectionsMaxReauthMs, new Date(credentialExpirationMs),\\n691:                         credentialExpirationMs - authenticationEndMs,\\n692:                         new Date(authenticationEndMs + retvalSessionLifetimeMs), retvalSessionLifetimeMs,\\n693:                         retvalSessionLifetimeMs);\\n694:             } else {\\n695:                 if (sessionExpirationTimeNanos != null)\\n696:                     LOG.debug(\\n697:                             \\\"Authentication complete; session max lifetime from broker config={} ms, no credential expiration; session expiration = {} ({} ms), sending {} ms to client\\\",\\n698:                             connectionsMaxReauthMs, new Date(authenticationEndMs + retvalSessionLifetimeMs),\\n699:                             retvalSessionLifetimeMs, retvalSessionLifetimeMs);\\n700:                 else\\n701:                     LOG.debug(\\n702:                             \\\"Authentication complete; session max lifetime from broker config={} ms, no credential expiration; no session expiration, sending 0 ms to client\\\",\\n703:                             connectionsMaxReauthMs);\\n704:             }\\n705:             return retvalSessionLifetimeMs;\\n706:         }\\n707: \\n708:         public Long reauthenticationLatencyMs() {\\n709:             if (!reauthenticating())\\n710:                 return null;\\n711:             // record at least 1 ms if there is some latency\\n712:             long latencyNanos = authenticationEndNanos - reauthenticationBeginNanos;\\n713:             return latencyNanos == 0L ? 0L : Math.max(1L, Math.round(latencyNanos / 1000.0 / 1000.0));\\n714:         }\\n715: \\n716:         private long zeroIfNegative(long value) {\\n717:             return Math.max(0L, value);\\n718:         }        \\n719:     }\\n720: }\\n721: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-benchmarks/kafka--be816b82@7bb066906e7979c9d10cdc924186dfe3f49a9428/-/blob/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/security/authenticator/SaslServerAuthenticator.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n3:  * contributor license agreements.
