  "stdout": "            when(saslServer.isComplete()).thenReturn(false).thenReturn(true);\n            mockRequest(saslAuthenticateRequest(), transportLayer);\n            authenticator.authenticate();\n\n            long atMaxReauthNanos = time.nanoseconds() + Duration.ofMillis(maxReauthMs).toNanos();\n            assertEquals(atMaxReauthNanos, authenticator.serverSessionExpirationTimeNanos());\n\n            ByteBuffer secondResponseSent = getResponses(transportLayer).get(1);\n            consumeSizeAndHeader(secondResponseSent);\n            SaslAuthenticateResponse response = SaslAuthenticateResponse.parse(secondResponseSent, (short) 2);\n            assertEquals(maxReauthMs, response.sessionLifetimeMs());\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    public void testSessionExpiresAtTokenExpiry() throws IOException {\n        String mechanism = OAuthBearerLoginModule.OAUTHBEARER_MECHANISM;\n        SaslServer saslServer = mock(SaslServer.class);\n        MockTime time = new MockTime(0, 1, 1000);\n        Duration tokenExpiryShorterThanMaxReauth = Duration.ofSeconds(2);\n        long maxReauthMs = tokenExpiryShorterThanMaxReauth.multipliedBy(2).toMillis();\n\n        try (\n                MockedStatic<?> ignored = mockSaslServer(saslServer, mechanism, time, tokenExpiryShorterThanMaxReauth);\n                MockedStatic<?> ignored2 = mockKafkaPrincipal(\"[principal-type]\", \"[principal-name\");\n                TransportLayer transportLayer = mockTransportLayer()\n        ) {\n\n            SaslServerAuthenticator authenticator = getSaslServerAuthenticatorForOAuth(mechanism, transportLayer, time, maxReauthMs);\n\n            mockRequest(saslHandshakeRequest(mechanism), transportLayer);\n            authenticator.authenticate();\n\n            when(saslServer.isComplete()).thenReturn(false).thenReturn(true);\n            mockRequest(saslAuthenticateRequest(), transportLayer);\n            authenticator.authenticate();\n\n            long atTokenExpiryNanos = time.nanoseconds() + tokenExpiryShorterThanMaxReauth.toNanos();\n            assertEquals(atTokenExpiryNanos, authenticator.serverSessionExpirationTimeNanos());\n\n            ByteBuffer secondResponseSent = getResponses(transportLayer).get(1);\n            consumeSizeAndHeader(secondResponseSent);\n            SaslAuthenticateResponse response = SaslAuthenticateResponse.parse(secondResponseSent, (short) 2);\n            assertEquals(tokenExpiryShorterThanMaxReauth.toMillis(), response.sessionLifetimeMs());\n        }\n    }\n\n    private SaslServerAuthenticator getSaslServerAuthenticatorForOAuth(String mechanism, TransportLayer transportLayer, Time time, Long maxReauth) {\n        Map<String, ?> configs = Collections.singletonMap(BrokerSecurityConfigs.SASL_ENABLED_MECHANISMS_CONFIG,\n                Collections.singletonList(mechanism));\n        ChannelMetadataRegistry metadataRegistry = new DefaultChannelMetadataRegistry();\n\n        return setupAuthenticator(configs, transportLayer, mechanism, metadataRegistry, time, maxReauth);\n    }\n\n    private MockedStatic<?> mockSaslServer(SaslServer saslServer, String mechanism, Time time, Duration tokenExpirationDuration) throws SaslException {\n        when(saslServer.getMechanismName()).thenReturn(mechanism);\n        when(saslServer.evaluateResponse(any())).thenReturn(new byte[]{});\n        long millisToExpiration = tokenExpirationDuration.toMillis();\n        when(saslServer.getNegotiatedProperty(eq(SaslInternalConfigs.CREDENTIAL_LIFETIME_MS_SASL_NEGOTIATED_PROPERTY_KEY)))\n                .thenReturn(time.milliseconds() + millisToExpiration);\n        return Mockito.mockStatic(Sasl.class, (Answer<SaslServer>) invocation -> saslServer);\n    }\n\n    private MockedStatic<?> mockKafkaPrincipal(String principalType, String name) {\n        KafkaPrincipalBuilder kafkaPrincipalBuilder = mock(KafkaPrincipalBuilder.class);\n        when(kafkaPrincipalBuilder.build(any())).thenReturn(new KafkaPrincipal(principalType, name));\n        MockedStatic<ChannelBuilders> channelBuilders = Mockito.mockStatic(ChannelBuilders.class, Answers.RETURNS_MOCKS);\n        channelBuilders.when(() ->\n                ChannelBuilders.createPrincipalBuilder(anyMap(), any(KerberosShortNamer.class), any(SslPrincipalMapper.class))\n        ).thenReturn(kafkaPrincipalBuilder);\n        return channelBuilders;\n    }\n\n    private void consumeSizeAndHeader(ByteBuffer responseBuffer) {\n        responseBuffer.getInt();\n        ResponseHeader.parse(responseBuffer, (short) 1);\n    }\n\n    private List<ByteBuffer> getResponses(TransportLayer transportLayer) throws IOException {\n        ArgumentCaptor<ByteBuffer[]> buffersCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(ByteBuffer[].class);\n        verify(transportLayer, times(2)).write(buffersCaptor.capture());\n        return buffersCaptor.getAllValues().stream()\n                .map(this::concatBuffers)\n                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n    }\n\n    private ByteBuffer concatBuffers(ByteBuffer[] buffers) {\n        int combinedCapacity = 0;\n        for (ByteBuffer buffer : buffers) {\n            combinedCapacity += buffer.capacity();\n        }\n        if (combinedCapacity > 0) {\n            ByteBuffer concat = ByteBuffer.allocate(combinedCapacity);\n            for (ByteBuffer buffer : buffers) {\n                concat.put(buffer);\n            }\n            return safeFlip(concat);\n        } else {\n            return ByteBuffer.allocate(0);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private ByteBuffer safeFlip(ByteBuffer buffer) {\n        return (ByteBuffer) ((Buffer) buffer).flip();\n    }\n\n    private SaslAuthenticateRequest saslAuthenticateRequest() {\n        SaslAuthenticateRequestData authenticateRequestData = new SaslAuthenticateRequestData();\n        return new SaslAuthenticateRequest.Builder(authenticateRequestData).build(ApiKeys.SASL_AUTHENTICATE.latestVersion());\n    }\n\n    private SaslHandshakeRequest saslHandshakeRequest(String mechanism) {\n        SaslHandshakeRequestData handshakeRequestData = new SaslHandshakeRequestData();\n        handshakeRequestData.setMechanism(mechanism);\n        return new SaslHandshakeRequest.Builder(handshakeRequestData).build(ApiKeys.SASL_HANDSHAKE.latestVersion());\n    }\n\n    private TransportLayer mockTransportLayer() throws IOException {\n        TransportLayer transportLayer = mock(TransportLayer.class, Answers.RETURNS_DEEP_STUBS);\n        when(transportLayer.socketChannel().socket().getInetAddress()).thenReturn(InetAddress.getLoopbackAddress());\n        when(transportLayer.write(any(ByteBuffer[].class))).thenReturn(Long.MAX_VALUE);\n        return transportLayer;\n    }\n\n    private void mockRequest(AbstractRequest request, TransportLayer transportLayer) throws IOException {\n        mockRequest(new RequestHeader(request.apiKey(), request.apiKey().latestVersion(), clientId, 0), request, transportLayer);\n    }\n\n    private void mockRequest(RequestHeader header, AbstractRequest request, TransportLayer transportLayer) throws IOException {\n        ByteBuffer headerBuffer = RequestTestUtils.serializeRequestHeader(header);\n\n        ByteBuffer requestBuffer = request.serialize();\n        requestBuffer.rewind();\n\n        when(transportLayer.read(any(ByteBuffer.class))).then(invocation -> {\n            invocation.<ByteBuffer>getArgument(0).putInt(headerBuffer.remaining() + requestBuffer.remaining());\n            return 4;\n        }).then(invocation -> {\n            invocation.<ByteBuffer>getArgument(0)\n                    .put(headerBuffer.duplicate())\n                    .put(requestBuffer.duplicate());\n            return headerBuffer.remaining() + requestBuffer.remaining();\n        });\n    }\n\n    private void testApiVersionsRequest(short version, String expectedSoftwareName,\n                                        String expectedSoftwareVersion) throws IOException {\n        TransportLayer transportLayer = mockTransportLayer();\n        Map<String, ?> configs = Collections.singletonMap(BrokerSecurityConfigs.SASL_ENABLED_MECHANISMS_CONFIG,\n                Collections.singletonList(SCRAM_SHA_256.mechanismName()));\n        ChannelMetadataRegistry metadataRegistry = new DefaultChannelMetadataRegistry();\n        SaslServerAuthenticator authenticator = setupAuthenticator(configs, transportLayer, SCRAM_SHA_256.mechanismName(), metadataRegistry);\n\n        RequestHeader header = new RequestHeader(ApiKeys.API_VERSIONS, version, clientId, 0);\n        ApiVersionsRequest request = new ApiVersionsRequest.Builder().build(version);\n        mockRequest(header, request, transportLayer);\n\n        authenticator.authenticate();\n\n        assertEquals(expectedSoftwareName, metadataRegistry.clientInformation().softwareName());\n        assertEquals(expectedSoftwareVersion, metadataRegistry.clientInformation().softwareVersion());\n\n        verify(transportLayer, times(2)).read(any(ByteBuffer.class));\n    }\n\n    private SaslServerAuthenticator setupAuthenticator(Map<String, ?> configs, TransportLayer transportLayer,\n                                                       String mechanism, ChannelMetadataRegistry metadataRegistry) {\n        return setupAuthenticator(configs, transportLayer, mechanism, metadataRegistry, new MockTime(), null);\n    }\n\n    private SaslServerAuthenticator setupAuthenticator(Map<String, ?> configs, TransportLayer transportLayer,\n                                                       String mechanism, ChannelMetadataRegistry metadataRegistry, Time time, Long maxReauth) {\n        TestJaasConfig jaasConfig = new TestJaasConfig();\n        jaasConfig.addEntry(\"jaasContext\", PlainLoginModule.class.getName(), new HashMap<>());\n        Map<String, Subject> subjects = Collections.singletonMap(mechanism, new Subject());\n        Map<String, AuthenticateCallbackHandler> callbackHandlers = Collections.singletonMap(\n                mechanism, new SaslServerCallbackHandler());\n        ApiVersionsResponse apiVersionsResponse = TestUtils.defaultApiVersionsResponse(\n                ApiMessageType.ListenerType.ZK_BROKER);\n        Map<String, Long> connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism = maxReauth != null ?\n                Collections.singletonMap(mechanism, maxReauth) : Collections.emptyMap();\n\n        return new SaslServerAuthenticator(configs, callbackHandlers, \"node\", subjects, null,\n                new ListenerName(\"ssl\"), SecurityProtocol.SASL_SSL, transportLayer, connectionsMaxReauthMsByMechanism,\n                metadataRegistry, time, () -> apiVersionsResponse);\n    }\n\n}"
}

Input
{
  "command": "git show HEAD:core/src/main/scala/kafka/security/authorizer/AclAuthorizer.scala 2>/dev/null | sed -n '330,475p'",
  "description": "Read authorizeByResourceType and authorizeAction methods from AclAuthorizer HEAD"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "    (0 until aclBindingFilters.size).map { i =>\n      new AclDeleteResult(deletedResult.getOrElse(i, Set.empty[AclBindingDeleteResult]).toSet.asJava)\n    }.map(CompletableFuture.completedFuture[AclDeleteResult]).asJava\n  }\n\n  override def acls(filter: AclBindingFilter): lang.Iterable[AclBinding] = {\n    val aclBindings = new util.ArrayList[AclBinding]()\n    aclCache.forKeyValue { case (resource, versionedAcls) =>\n      versionedAcls.acls.foreach { acl =>\n        val binding = new AclBinding(resource, acl.ace)\n        if (filter.matches(binding))\n          aclBindings.add(binding)\n      }\n    }\n    aclBindings\n  }\n\n  override def close(): Unit = {\n    aclChangeListeners.foreach(listener => listener.close())\n    if (zkClient != null) zkClient.close()\n  }\n\n  override def authorizeByResourceType(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext,\n                                       op: AclOperation,\n                                       resourceType: ResourceType): AuthorizationResult = {\n    SecurityUtils.authorizeByResourceTypeCheckArgs(op, resourceType)\n\n    val principal = new KafkaPrincipal(\n      requestContext.principal().getPrincipalType,\n      requestContext.principal().getName)\n\n    if (isSuperUser(principal))\n      return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n\n    val resourceSnapshot = resourceCache\n    val principalStr = principal.toString\n    val host = requestContext.clientAddress().getHostAddress\n    val action = new Action(op, new ResourcePattern(resourceType, \"NONE\", PatternType.UNKNOWN), 0, true, true)\n\n    val denyLiterals = matchingResources(\n      resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\n\n    if (denyAll(denyLiterals)) {\n      logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n      return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n    }\n\n    if (shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound) {\n      logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n      return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n    }\n\n    val denyPrefixes = matchingResources(\n      resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n\n    if (denyLiterals.isEmpty && denyPrefixes.isEmpty) {\n      if (hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n          || hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)) {\n        logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n        return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n      } else {\n        logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n        return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n      }\n    }\n\n    val allowLiterals = matchingResources(\n      resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\n    val allowPrefixes = matchingResources(\n      resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n\n    if (allowAny(allowLiterals, allowPrefixes, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes)) {\n      logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n      return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n    }\n\n    logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n    AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n  }\n\n  private def matchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\n                                principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\n                                resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): ArrayBuffer[Set[String]] = {\n    val matched = ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]()\n    for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WILDCARD_PRINCIPAL_STRING);\n         h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WILDCARD_HOST);\n         o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\n      val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\n        new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\n      resourceSnapshot.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n        case Some(resources) => matched += resources\n        case None =>\n      }\n    }\n    matched\n  }\n\n  private def hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\n                                   principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\n                                   resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): Boolean = {\n    for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WILDCARD_PRINCIPAL_STRING);\n         h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WILDCARD_HOST);\n         o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\n          val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\n            new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\n          if (resourceSnapshot.contains(resourceTypeKey))\n            return true\n    }\n    false\n  }\n\n  private def denyAll(denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean =\n    denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE))\n\n\n  private def allowAny(allowLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], allowPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\n                       denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n    (allowPrefixes.exists(_.exists(prefix => allowPrefix(prefix, denyPrefixes)))\n      || allowLiterals.exists(_.exists(literal => allowLiteral(literal, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes))))\n  }\n\n  private def allowLiteral(literalName: String, denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\n                           denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n    literalName match {\n      case ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE => true\n      case _ => !denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(literalName)) && !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(literalName, denyPrefixes)\n    }\n  }\n\n  private def allowPrefix(prefixName: String,\n                          denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n    !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(prefixName, denyPrefixes)\n  }\n\n  private def hasDominantPrefixedDeny(resourceName: String, denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n    val sb = new StringBuilder\n    for (ch <- resourceName.toCharArray) {\n      sb.append(ch)\n      if (denyPrefixes.exists(p => p.contains(sb.toString()))) {\n        return true\n      }\n    }\n    false\n  }\n\n  private def authorizeAction(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action): AuthorizationResult = {"
}

Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "        (acl.kafkaPrincipal == principal || acl.kafkaPrincipal == AclEntry.WILDCARD_PRINCIPAL) &&\n        (operation == acl.operation || acl.operation == AclOperation.ALL) &&\n        (acl.host == host || acl.host == AclEntry.WILDCARD_HOST)\n    }.exists { acl =>\n      authorizerLogger.debug(s\"operation = $operation on resource = $resource from host = $host is $permissionType based on acl = $acl\")\n      true\n    }\n  }\n\n  private def loadCache(): Unit = {\n    lock synchronized  {\n      loadAllAcls(zkClient, this, updateCache)\n    }\n  }\n\n  private[authorizer] def startZkChangeListeners(): Unit = {\n    aclChangeListeners = ZkAclChangeStore.stores\n      .map(store => store.createListener(AclChangedNotificationHandler, zkClient))\n  }\n\n  private def filterToResources(filter: ResourcePatternFilter): Set[ResourcePattern] = {\n    filter.patternType match {\n      case PatternType.LITERAL | PatternType.PREFIXED =>\n        Set(new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, filter.patternType))\n      case PatternType.ANY =>\n        Set(new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, PatternType.LITERAL),\n          new ResourcePattern(filter.resourceType, filter.name, PatternType.PREFIXED))\n      case _ => throw new IllegalArgumentException(s\"Cannot determine matching resources for patternType $filter\")\n    }\n  }\n\n  private def logAuditMessage(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action, authorized: Boolean): Unit = {\n    def logMessage: String = {\n      val principal = requestContext.principal\n      val operation = SecurityUtils.operationName(action.operation)\n      val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\n      val resourceType = SecurityUtils.resourceTypeName(action.resourcePattern.resourceType)\n      val resource = s\"$resourceType$RESOURCE_SEPARATOR${action.resourcePattern.patternType}$RESOURCE_SEPARATOR${action.resourcePattern.name}\"\n      val authResult = if (authorized) \"Allowed\" else \"Denied\"\n      val apiKey = if (ApiKeys.hasId(requestContext.requestType)) ApiKeys.forId(requestContext.requestType).name else requestContext.requestType\n      val refCount = action.resourceReferenceCount\n\n      s\"Principal = $principal is $authResult Operation = $operation \" +\n        s\"from host = $host on resource = $resource for request = $apiKey with resourceRefCount = $refCount\"\n    }\n\n    if (authorized) {\n      // logIfAllowed is true if access is granted to the resource as a result of this authorization.\n      // In this case, log at debug level. If false, no access is actually granted, the result is used\n      // only to determine authorized operations. So log only at trace level.\n      if (action.logIfAllowed)\n        authorizerLogger.debug(logMessage)\n      else\n        authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\n    } else {\n      // logIfDenied is true if access to the resource was explicitly requested. Since this is an attempt\n      // to access unauthorized resources, log at info level. If false, this is either a request to determine\n      // authorized operations or a filter (e.g for regex subscriptions) to filter out authorized resources.\n      // In this case, log only at trace level.\n      if (action.logIfDenied)\n        authorizerLogger.info(logMessage)\n      else\n        authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n    * Safely updates the resources ACLs by ensuring reads and writes respect the expected zookeeper version.\n    * Continues to retry until it successfully updates zookeeper.\n    *\n    * Returns a boolean indicating if the content of the ACLs was actually changed.\n    *\n    * @param resource the resource to change ACLs for\n    * @param getNewAcls function to transform existing acls to new ACLs\n    * @return boolean indicating if a change was made\n    */\n  private def updateResourceAcls(resource: ResourcePattern)(getNewAcls: Set[AclEntry] => Set[AclEntry]): Boolean = {\n    var currentVersionedAcls =\n      if (aclCache.contains(resource))\n        getAclsFromCache(resource)\n      else\n        getAclsFromZk(zkClient, resource)\n    var newVersionedAcls: VersionedAcls = null\n    var writeComplete = false\n    var retries = 0\n    while (!writeComplete && retries <= maxUpdateRetries) {\n      val newAcls = getNewAcls(currentVersionedAcls.acls)\n      val (updateSucceeded, updateVersion) =\n        if (newAcls.nonEmpty) {\n          if (currentVersionedAcls.exists)\n            zkClient.conditionalSetAclsForResource(resource, newAcls, currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion)\n          else\n            zkClient.createAclsForResourceIfNotExists(resource, newAcls)\n        } else {\n          trace(s\"Deleting path for $resource because it had no ACLs remaining\")\n          (zkClient.conditionalDelete(resource, currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion), 0)\n        }\n\n      if (!updateSucceeded) {\n        trace(s\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource. Used version ${currentVersionedAcls.zkVersion}. Reading data and retrying update.\")\n        Thread.sleep(backoffTime)\n        currentVersionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(zkClient, resource)\n        retries += 1\n      } else {\n        newVersionedAcls = VersionedAcls(newAcls, updateVersion)\n        writeComplete = updateSucceeded\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (!writeComplete)\n      throw new IllegalStateException(s\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource after trying a maximum of $maxUpdateRetries times\")"
}

denyAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\\n469:       // Check if there are any Deny ACLs which would forbid this operation.\\n470:       matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, DENY, acls)\\n471:     }\\n472: \\n473:     def allowAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\\n474:       // Check if there are any Allow ACLs which would allow this operation.\\n475:       // Allowing read, write, delete, or alter implies allowing describe.\\n476:       // See #{org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation} for more details about ACL inheritance.\\n477:       val allowOps = operation match {\\n478:         case DESCRIBE => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE, READ, WRITE, DELETE, ALTER)\\n479:         case DESCRIBE_CONFIGS => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE_CONFIGS, ALTER_CONFIGS)\\n480:         case _ => Set[AclOperation](operation)\\n481:       }\\n482:       allowOps.exists(operation => matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, ALLOW, acls))\\n483:     }\\n484: \\n485:     def aclsAllowAccess = {\\n486:       // we allow an operation if no acls are found and user has configured to allow all users\\n487:       // when no acls are found or if no deny acls are found and at     "content": "350:     val denyPrefixes = matchingResources(\n351:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.DENY, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n352: \n353:     if (denyLiterals.isEmpty && denyPrefixes.isEmpty) {\n354:       if (hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n355:           || hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)) {\n356:         logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n357:         return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n358:       } else {\n359:         logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n360:         return AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n361:       }\n362:     }\n363: \n364:     val allowLiterals = matchingResources(\n365:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.LITERAL)\n366:     val allowPrefixes = matchingResources(\n367:       resourceSnapshot, principalStr, host, op, AclPermissionType.ALLOW, resourceType, PatternType.PREFIXED)\n368: \n369:     if (allowAny(allowLiterals, allowPrefixes, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes)) {\n370:       logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = true)\n371:       return AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED\n372:     }\n373: \n374:     logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized = false)\n375:     AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n376:   }\n377: \n378:   private def matchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\n379:                                 principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\n380:                                 resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): ArrayBuffer[Set[String]] = {\n381:     val matched = ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]()\n382:     for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WildcardPrincipalString);\n383:          h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WildcardHost);\n384:          o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\n385:       val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\n386:         new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\n387:       resourceSnapshot.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n388:         case Some(resources) => matched += resources\n389:         case None =>\n390:       }\n391:     }\n392:     matched\n393:   }\n394: \n395:   private def hasMatchingResources(resourceSnapshot: immutable.Map[ResourceTypeKey, immutable.Set[String]],\n396:                                    principal: String, host: String, op: AclOperation, permission: AclPermissionType,\n397:                                    resourceType: ResourceType, patternType: PatternType): Boolean = {\n398:     for (p <- Set(principal, AclEntry.WildcardPrincipalString);\n399:          h <- Set(host, AclEntry.WildcardHost);\n400:          o <- Set(op, AclOperation.ALL)) {\n401:           val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(\n402:             new AccessControlEntry(p, h, o, permission), resourceType, patternType)\n403:           if (resourceSnapshot.contains(resourceTypeKey))\n404:             return true\n405:     }\n406:     false\n407:   }\n408: \n409:   private def denyAll(denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean =\n410:     denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE))\n411: \n412: \n413:   private def allowAny(allowLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], allowPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\n414:                        denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]], denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n415:     (allowPrefixes.exists(_.exists(prefix => allowPrefix(prefix, denyPrefixes)))\n416:       || allowLiterals.exists(_.exists(literal => allowLiteral(literal, denyLiterals, denyPrefixes))))\n417:   }\n418: \n419:   private def allowLiteral(literalName: String, denyLiterals: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]],\n420:                            denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n421:     literalName match {\n422:       case ResourcePattern.WILDCARD_RESOURCE => true\n423:       case _ => !denyLiterals.exists(_.contains(literalName)) && !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(literalName, denyPrefixes)\n424:     }\n425:   }\n426: \n427:   private def allowPrefix(prefixName: String,\n428:                           denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n429:     !hasDominantPrefixedDeny(prefixName, denyPrefixes)\n430:   }\n431: \n432:   private def hasDominantPrefixedDeny(resourceName: String, denyPrefixes: ArrayBuffer[immutable.Set[String]]): Boolean = {\n433:     val sb = new StringBuilder\n434:     for (ch <- resourceName.toCharArray) {\n435:       sb.append(ch)\n436:       if (denyPrefixes.exists(p => p.contains(sb.toString()))) {\n437:         return true\n438:       }\n439:     }\n440:     false\n441:   }\n442: \n443: \n444:   private def authorizeAction(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, action: Action): AuthorizationResult = {\n445:     val resource = action.resourcePattern\n446:     if (resource.patternType != PatternType.LITERAL) {\n447:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Only literal resources are supported. Got: \" + resource.patternType)\n448:     }\n449: \n450:     // ensure we compare identical classes\n451:     val sessionPrincipal = requestContext.principal\n452:     val principal = if (classOf[KafkaPrincipal] != sessionPrincipal.getClass)\n453:       new KafkaPrincipal(sessionPrincipal.getPrincipalType, sessionPrincipal.getName)\n454:     else\n455:       sessionPrincipal\n456: \n457:     val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\n458:     val operation = action.operation\n459: \n460:     def isEmptyAclAndAuthorized(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n461:       if (acls.isEmpty) {\n462:         // No ACLs found for this resource, permission is determined by value of config allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found\n463:         authorizerLogger.debug(s\"No acl found for resource $resource, authorized = $shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound\")\n464:         shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound\n465:       } else false\n466:     }\n467: \n468:     def denyAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n469:       // Check if there are any Deny ACLs which would forbid this operation.\n470:       matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, DENY, acls)\n471:     }\n472: \n473:     def allowAclExists(acls: AclSeqs): Boolean = {\n474:       // Check if there are any Allow ACLs which would allow this operation.\n475:       // Allowing read, write, delete, or alter implies allowing describe.\n476:       // See #{org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation} for more details about ACL inheritance.\n477:       val allowOps = operation match {\n478:         case DESCRIBE => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE, READ, WRITE, DELETE, ALTER)\n479:         case DESCRIBE_CONFIGS => Set[AclOperation](DESCRIBE_CONFIGS, ALTER_CONFIGS)\n480:         case _ => Set[AclOperation](operation)\n481:       }\n482:       allowOps.exists(operation => matchingAclExists(operation, resource, principal, host, ALLOW, acls))\n483:     }\n484: \n485:     def aclsAllowAccess = {\n486:       // we allow an operation if no acls are found and user has configured to allow all users\n487:       // when no acls are found or if no deny acls are found and at least one allow acls matches.\n488:       val acls = matchingAcls(resource.resourceType, resource.name)\n489:       isEmptyAclAndAuthorized(acls) || (!denyAclExists(acls) && allowAclExists(acls))\n490:     }\n491: \n492:     // Evaluate if operation is allowed\n493:     val authorized = isSuperUser(principal) || aclsAllowAccess\n494: \n495:     logAuditMessage(requestContext, action, authorized)\n496:     if (authorized) AuthorizationResult.ALLOWED else AuthorizationResult.DENIED\n497:   }\n498: \n499:   def isSuperUser(principal: KafkaPrincipal): Boolean = {\n500:     if (superUsers.contains(principal)) {\n501: ",

{\\n586:     def logMessage: String = {\\n587:       val principal = requestContext.principal\\n588:       val operation = SecurityUtils.operationName(action.operation)\\n589:       val host = requestContext.clientAddress.getHostAddress\\n590:       val resourceType = SecurityUtils.resourceTypeName(action.resourcePattern.resourceType)\\n591:       val resource = s\\\"$resourceType$ResourceSeparator${action.resourcePattern.patternType}$ResourceSeparator${action.resourcePattern.name}\\\"\\n592:       val authResult = if (authorized) \\\"Allowed\\\" else action.resourceReferenceCount\\n595: \\n596:       s\\\"Principal = $principal is $authResult Operation = $operation \\\" +\\n597:         s\\\"from host = $host on resource = $resource for request = $apiKey with resourceRefCount = $refCount\\\"\\n598:     }\\n599: \\n600:     if (authorized) {\\n601:       // logIfAllowed is true if access is granted to the resource as a result of this authorization.\\n602:       // In this case, log at debug level. So log only at trace level.\\n604:       if (action.logIfAllowed)\\n605:         authorizerLogger.debug(logMessage)\\n606:       else\\n607:         authorizerLogger.trace(logMessage)\\n608:     } else {\\n609:       // logIfDenied is true if access to the resource was explicitly requested. 60. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "git show HEAD:core/src/main/scala/kafka/security/authorizer/AclAuthorizer.scala 2>/dev/null | sed -n '680,767p'",
  "description": "Read end of AclAuthorizer HEAD (update cache, resource cache methods)"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "      throw new IllegalStateException(s\"Failed to update ACLs for $resource after trying a maximum of $maxUpdateRetries times\")\n\n    if (newVersionedAcls.acls != currentVersionedAcls.acls) {\n      info(s\"Updated ACLs for $resource with new version ${newVersionedAcls.zkVersion}\")\n      debug(s\"Updated ACLs for $resource to $newVersionedAcls\")\n      updateCache(resource, newVersionedAcls)\n      updateAclChangedFlag(resource)\n      true\n    } else {\n      debug(s\"Updated ACLs for $resource, no change was made\")\n      updateCache(resource, newVersionedAcls) // Even if no change, update the version\n      false\n    }\n  }\n\n  private def getAclsFromCache(resource: ResourcePattern): VersionedAcls = {\n    aclCache.getOrElse(resource, throw new IllegalArgumentException(s\"ACLs do not exist in the cache for resource $resource\"))\n  }\n\n\n  // Visible for benchmark\n  def updateCache(resource: ResourcePattern, versionedAcls: VersionedAcls): Unit = {\n    val currentAces: Set[AccessControlEntry] = aclCache.get(resource).map(_.acls.map(_.ace)).getOrElse(Set.empty)\n    val newAces: Set[AccessControlEntry] = versionedAcls.acls.map(aclEntry => aclEntry.ace)\n    val acesToAdd = newAces.diff(currentAces)\n    val acesToRemove = currentAces.diff(newAces)\n\n    acesToAdd.foreach { ace =>\n      val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(ace, resource.resourceType(), resource.patternType())\n      resourceCache.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n        case Some(resources) => resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> (resources + resource.name()))\n        case None => resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> immutable.HashSet(resource.name()))\n      }\n    }\n    acesToRemove.foreach { ace =>\n      val resourceTypeKey = ResourceTypeKey(ace, resource.resourceType(), resource.patternType())\n      resourceCache.get(resourceTypeKey) match {\n        case Some(resources) =>\n          val newResources = resources - resource.name()\n          if (newResources.isEmpty) {\n            resourceCache -= resourceTypeKey\n          } else {\n            resourceCache += (resourceTypeKey -> newResources)\n          }\n        case None =>\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (versionedAcls.acls.nonEmpty) {\n      aclCache = aclCache.updated(resource, versionedAcls)\n    } else {\n      aclCache -= resource\n    }\n  }\n\n  private def updateAclChangedFlag(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\n    zkClient.createAclChangeNotification(resource)\n  }\n\n  private def backoffTime = {\n    retryBackoffMs + Random.nextInt(retryBackoffJitterMs)\n  }\n\n  private def apiException(e: Throwable): ApiException = {\n    e match {\n      case e1: ApiException => e1\n      case e1 => new ApiException(e1)\n    }\n  }\n\n  private[authorizer] def processAclChangeNotification(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\n    lock synchronized {\n      val versionedAcls = getAclsFromZk(zkClient, resource)\n      info(s\"Processing Acl change notification for $resource, versionedAcls : ${versionedAcls.acls}, zkVersion : ${versionedAcls.zkVersion}\")\n      updateCache(resource, versionedAcls)\n    }\n  }\n\n  private object AclChangedNotificationHandler extends AclChangeNotificationHandler {\n    override def processNotification(resource: ResourcePattern): Unit = {\n      processAclChangeNotification(resource)\n    }\n  }\n\n  private case class ResourceTypeKey(ace: AccessControlEntry,\n                                     resourceType: ResourceType,\n                                     patternType: PatternType)\n}"
}

com.typesafe.scalalogging.Logger\nimport kafka.server.{KafkaConfig, KafkaServer}\nimport kafka.utils._\nimport kafka.utils.Implicits._\nimport kafka.zk._\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.Endpoint\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.acl._\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclOperation._\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.acl.AclPermissionType.{ALLOW, DENY}\nimport org.apache.kafka.security.authorizer.AclEntry.RESOURCE_SEPARATOR\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.{ApiException, InvalidRequestException, UnsupportedVersionException}\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiKeys\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.resource._\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.auth.KafkaPrincipal\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.utils.{SecurityUtils, Time}\nimport org.apache.kafka.security.authorizer.AclEntry\nimport org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer.AclDeleteResult.AclBindingDeleteResult\nimport org.apache.kafka.server.authorizer._\nimport org.apache.kafka.server.config.ReplicationConfigs\nimport org.apache.kafka.server.common.MetadataVersion.IBP_2_0_IV1\nimport org.apache.kafka.server.config.ZkConfigs\nimport org.apache.zookeeper.client.ZKClientConfig\n\nimport scala.annotation.nowarn\nimport scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer\nimport scala.collection.{Seq, immutable, mutable}\nimport scala.jdk.CollectionConverters._\nimport scala.util.{Failure, Random, Success, Try}\n\nobject AclAuthorizer {\n  // Optional override zookeeper cluster configuration where acls will be stored. If not specified,\n  // acls will be stored in the same zookeeper where all other kafka broker metadata is stored.\n  val configPrefix: String = \"authorizer.\"\n  private val ZkUrlProp = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.url\"\n  private val ZkConnectionTimeOutProp = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms\"\n  private val ZkSessionTimeOutProp = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.session.timeout.ms\"\n  private val ZkMaxInFlightRequests = s\"${configPrefix}zookeeper.max.in.flight.requests\"\n\n  // Semi-colon separated list of users that will be treated as super users and will have access to all the resources\n  // for all actions from all hosts, defaults to no super users.\n  val SuperUsersProp: String = \"super.users\"\n  // If set to true when no acls are found for a resource, authorizer allows access to everyone. Defaults to false.\n  val AllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFoundProp: String = \"allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found\"\n\n  case class VersionedAcls(acls: Set[AclEntry], zkVersion: Int) {\n    def exists: Boolean = zkVersion != ZkVersion.UnknownVersion\n  }\n\n  private class AclSeqs(seqs: Seq[AclEntry]*) {\n    def find(p: AclEntry => Boolean): Option[AclEntry] = {\n      // Lazily iterate through the inner `Seq` elements and stop as soon as we find a match\n      val it = seqs.iterator.flatMap(_.find(p))\n      if (it.hasNext) Some(it.next())\n      else None\n    }\n\n    def isEmpty: Boolean = !seqs.exists(_.nonEmpty)\n  }\n\n  val NoAcls: VersionedAcls = VersionedAcls(Set.empty, ZkVersion.UnknownVersion)\n  val WildcardHost: String = \"*\"\n\n  // Orders by resource type, then resource pattern type and finally reverse ordering by name.\n  class ResourceOrdering extends Ordering[ResourcePattern] {\n\n    def compare(a: ResourcePattern, b: ResourcePattern): Int = {\n      val rt = a.resourceType.compareTo(b.resourceType)\n      if (rt != 0)\n        rt\n      else {\n        val rnt = a.patternType.compareTo(b.patternType)\n        if (rnt != 0)\n          rnt\n        else\n          (a.name compare b.name) * -1\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private[authorizer] def zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfigAndMap(kafkaConfig: KafkaConfig, configMap: mutable.Map[String, _<:Any]): ZKClientConfig = {"
}

  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "   * Guaranteed to be called before any authorize call is made.\n   */\n  override def configure(javaConfigs: util.Map[String, _]): Unit = {\n    val configs = javaConfigs.asScala\n    val props = new java.util.Properties()\n    configs.forKeyValue { (key, value) => props.put(key, value.toString.trim) }\n\n    superUsers = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.SuperUsersProp).collect {\n      case str: String if str.nonEmpty => str.split(\";\").map(s => SecurityUtils.parseKafkaPrincipal(s.trim)).toSet\n    }.getOrElse(Set.empty[KafkaPrincipal])\n\n    shouldAllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFound = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.AllowEveryoneIfNoAclIsFoundProp).exists(_.toString.trim.toBoolean)\n\n    // Use `KafkaConfig` in order to get the default ZK config values if not present in `javaConfigs`. Note that this\n    // means that `KafkaConfig.zkConnect` must always be set by the user (even if `AclAuthorizer.ZkUrlProp` is also\n    // set).\n    val kafkaConfig = KafkaConfig.fromProps(props, doLog = false)\n    val zkUrl = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkUrlProp).map(_.toString.trim).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkConnect)\n    val zkConnectionTimeoutMs = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkConnectionTimeOutProp).map(_.toString.trim.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkConnectionTimeoutMs)\n    val zkSessionTimeOutMs = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkSessionTimeOutProp).map(_.toString.trim.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkSessionTimeoutMs)\n    val zkMaxInFlightRequests = configs.get(AclAuthorizer.ZkMaxInFlightRequests).map(_.toString.trim.toInt).getOrElse(kafkaConfig.zkMaxInFlightRequests)\n\n    val zkClientConfig = AclAuthorizer.zkClientConfigFromKafkaConfigAndMap(kafkaConfig, configs)\n    val time = Time.SYSTEM\n    // createChrootIfNecessary=true is necessary in case we are running in a KRaft cluster\n    // because such a cluster will not create any chroot path in ZooKeeper (it doesn't connect to ZooKeeper)\n    zkClient = KafkaZkClient(zkUrl, kafkaConfig.zkEnableSecureAcls, zkSessionTimeOutMs, zkConnectionTimeoutMs,\n      zkMaxInFlightRequests, time, name = \"ACL authorizer\", zkClientConfig = zkClientConfig,\n      metricGroup = \"kafka.security\", metricType = \"AclAuthorizer\", createChrootIfNecessary = true, enableEntityConfigControllerCheck = false)\n    zkClient.createAclPaths()\n\n    extendedAclSupport = kafkaConfig.interBrokerProtocolVersion.isAtLeast(IBP_2_0_IV1)\n\n    // Start change listeners first and then populate the cache so that there is no timing window\n    // between loading cache and processing change notifications.\n    startZkChangeListeners()\n    loadCache()\n  }\n\n  override def start(serverInfo: AuthorizerServerInfo): util.Map[Endpoint, _ <: CompletionStage[Void]] = {\n    serverInfo.endpoints.asScala.map { endpoint =>\n      endpoint -> CompletableFuture.completedFuture[Void](null)\n    }.toMap.asJava\n  }\n\n  override def authorize(requestContext: AuthorizableRequestContext, actions: util.List[Action]): util.List[AuthorizationResult] = {"
}

newAcls\\n227:             }\\n228:             aclsWithIndex.foreach { case (_, index) => results(index) = AclCreateResult.SUCCESS }\\n229:           } catch {\\n230:             case e: Throwable   "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\n * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\n * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\n * (the \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\n * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n *\n *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n *\n * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n * limitations under the License.\n */\npackage org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals;\n\nimport java.security.InvalidKeyException;\nimport java.security.MessageDigest;\nimport java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;\nimport java.util.Arrays;\nimport java.util.Collection;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport javax.security.auth.callback.Callback;\nimport javax.security.auth.callback.CallbackHandler;\nimport javax.security.auth.callback.NameCallback;\nimport javax.security.sasl.SaslException;\nimport javax.security.sasl.SaslServer;\nimport javax.security.sasl.SaslServerFactory;\n\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.AuthenticationException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.IllegalSaslStateException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.SaslAuthenticationException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.authenticator.SaslInternalConfigs;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredential;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredentialCallback;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramLoginModule;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFinalMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFirstMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFinalMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFirstMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.token.delegation.internals.DelegationTokenCredentialCallback;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.utils.Utils;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n\n/**\n * SaslServer implementation for SASL/SCRAM. This server is configured with a callback\n * handler for integration with a credential manager. Kafka brokers provide callbacks\n * based on a Zookeeper-based password store.\n *\n * @see <a href=\"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5802\">RFC 5802</a>\n */\npublic class ScramSaslServer implements SaslServer {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ScramSaslServer.class);\n    private static final Set<String> SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS = Utils.mkSet(ScramLoginModule.TOKEN_AUTH_CONFIG);\n\n    enum State {\n        RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE,\n        RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE,\n        COMPLETE,\n        FAILED\n    }\n\n    private final ScramMechanism mechanism;\n    private final ScramFormatter formatter;\n    private final CallbackHandler callbackHandler;\n    private State state;\n    private String username;\n    private ClientFirstMessage clientFirstMessage;\n    private ServerFirstMessage serverFirstMessage;\n    private ScramExtensions scramExtensions;\n    private ScramCredential scramCredential;\n    private String authorizationId;\n    private Long tokenExpiryTimestamp;\n\n    public ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism mechanism, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler callbackHandler) throws NoSuchAlgorithmException {\n        this.mechanism = mechanism;\n        this.formatter = new ScramFormatter(mechanism);\n        this.callbackHandler = callbackHandler;\n        setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @throws SaslAuthenticationException if the requested authorization id is not the same as username.\n     * <p>\n     * <b>Note:</b> This method may throw {@link SaslAuthenticationException} to provide custom error messages\n     * to clients. But care should be taken to avoid including any information in the exception message that\n     * should not be leaked to unauthenticated clients. It may be safer to throw {@link SaslException} in\n     * most cases so that a standard error message is returned to clients.\n     * </p>\n     */\n    @Override\n    public byte[] evaluateResponse(byte[] response) throws SaslException, SaslAuthenticationException {\n        try {\n            switch (state) {\n                case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE:\n                    this.clientFirstMessage = new ClientFirstMessage(response);\n                    this.scramExtensions = clientFirstMessage.extensions();\n                    if (!SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.containsAll(scramExtensions.map().keySet())) {\n                        log.debug(\"Unsupported extensions will be ignored, supported {}, provided {}\",\n                                SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS, scramExtensions.map().keySet());\n                    }\n                    String serverNonce = formatter.secureRandomString();\n                    try {\n                        String saslName = clientFirstMessage.saslName();\n                        this.username = ScramFormatter.username(saslName);\n                        NameCallback nameCallback = new NameCallback(\"username\", username);\n                        ScramCredentialCallback credentialCallback;\n                        if (scramExtensions.tokenAuthenticated()) {\n                            DelegationTokenCredentialCallback tokenCallback = new DelegationTokenCredentialCallback();\n                            credentialCallback = tokenCallback;\n                            callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, tokenCallback});\n                            if (tokenCallback.tokenOwner() == null)\n                                throw new SaslException(\"Token Authentication failed: Invalid tokenId : \" + username);\n                            this.authorizationId = tokenCallback.tokenOwner();\n                            this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = tokenCallback.tokenExpiryTimestamp();\n                        } else {\n                            credentialCallback = new ScramCredentialCallback();\n                            callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, credentialCallback});\n                            this.authorizationId = username;\n                            this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = null;\n                        }\n                        this.scramCredential = credentialCallback.scramCredential();\n                        if (scramCredential == null)\n                            throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Invalid user credentials\");\n                        String authorizationIdFromClient = clientFirstMessage.authorizationId();\n                        if (!authorizationIdFromClient.isEmpty() && !authorizationIdFromClient.equals(username))\n                            throw new SaslAuthenticationException(\"Authentication failed: Client requested an authorization id that is different from username\");\n\n                        if (scramCredential.iterations() < mechanism.minIterations())\n                            throw new SaslException(\"Iterations \" + scramCredential.iterations() +  \" is less than the minimum \" + mechanism.minIterations() + \" for \" + mechanism);\n                        this.serverFirstMessage = new ServerFirstMessage(clientFirstMessage.nonce(),\n                                serverNonce,\n                                scramCredential.salt(),\n                                scramCredential.iterations());\n                        setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE);\n                        return serverFirstMessage.toBytes();\n                    } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\n                        throw e;\n                    } catch (Throwable e) {\n                        throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Credentials could not be obtained\", e);\n                    }\n\n                case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE:\n                    try {\n                        ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage = new ClientFinalMessage(response);\n                        verifyClientProof(clientFinalMessage);\n                        byte[] serverKey = scramCredential.serverKey();\n                        byte[] serverSignature = formatter.serverSignature(serverKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\n                        ServerFinalMessage serverFinalMessage = new ServerFinalMessage(null, serverSignature);\n                        clearCredentials();\n                        setState(State.COMPLETE);\n                        return serverFinalMessage.toBytes();\n                    } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\n                        throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Invalid client final message\", e);\n                    }\n\n                default:\n                    throw new IllegalSaslStateException(\"Unexpected challenge in Sasl server state \" + state);\n            }\n        } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\n            clearCredentials();\n            setState(State.FAILED);\n            throw e;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String getAuthorizationID() {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        return authorizationId;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String getMechanismName() {\n        return mechanism.mechanismName();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Object getNegotiatedProperty(String propName) {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        if (SaslInternalConfigs.CREDENTIAL_LIFETIME_MS_SASL_NEGOTIATED_PROPERTY_KEY.equals(propName))\n            return tokenExpiryTimestamp; // will be null if token not used\n        if (SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.contains(propName))\n            return scramExtensions.map().get(propName);\n        else\n            return null;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public boolean isComplete() {\n        return state == State.COMPLETE;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public byte[] unwrap(byte[] incoming, int offset, int len) {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        return Arrays.copyOfRange(incoming, offset, offset + len);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public byte[] wrap(byte[] outgoing, int offset, int len) {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        return Arrays.copyOfRange(outgoing, offset, offset + len);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void dispose() {\n    }\n\n    private void setState(State state) {\n        log.debug(\"Setting SASL/{} server state to {}\", mechanism, state);\n        this.state = state;\n    }\n\n    private void verifyClientProof(ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage) throws SaslException {\n        try {\n            byte[] expectedStoredKey = scramCredential.storedKey();\n            byte[] clientSignature = formatter.clientSignature(expectedStoredKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\n            byte[] computedStoredKey = formatter.storedKey(clientSignature, clientFinalMessage.proof());\n            if (!MessageDigest.isEqual(computedStoredKey, expectedStoredKey))\n                throw new SaslException(\"Invalid client credentials\");\n        } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\n            throw new SaslException(\"Sasl client verification failed\", e);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void clearCredentials() {\n        scramCredential = null;\n        clientFirstMessage = null;\n        serverFirstMessage = null;\n    }\n\n    public static class ScramSaslServerFactory implements SaslServerFactory {\n\n        @Override\n        public SaslServer createSaslServer(String mechanism, String protocol, String serverName, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler cbh)\n            throws SaslException {\n\n            if (!ScramMechanism.isScram(mechanism)) {\n                throw new SaslException(String.format(\"Requested mechanism '%s' is not supported. Supported mechanisms are '%s'.\",\n                        mechanism, ScramMechanism.mechanismNames()));\n            }\n            try {\n                return new ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism.forMechanismName(mechanism), props, cbh);\n            } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {\n                throw new SaslException(\"Hash algorithm not supported for mechanism \" + mechanism, e);\n            }\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String[] getMechanismNames(Map<String, ?> props) {\n            Collection<String> mechanisms = ScramMechanism.mechanismNames();\n            return mechanisms.toArray(new String[0]);\n        }\n    }\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/tmp/ScramSaslServer_head.java",
    "numLines": 267,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 267
  },
  "type": "text"

  "content": "/*\n * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\n * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\n * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\n * (the \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\n * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n *\n *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n *\n * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n * limitations under the License.\n */\npackage org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals;\n\nimport java.security.InvalidKeyException;\nimport java.security.MessageDigest;\nimport java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;\nimport java.util.Collection;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport javax.security.auth.callback.Callback;\nimport javax.security.auth.callback.CallbackHandler;\nimport javax.security.auth.callback.NameCallback;\nimport javax.security.sasl.SaslException;\nimport javax.security.sasl.SaslServer;\nimport javax.security.sasl.SaslServerFactory;\n\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.AuthenticationException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.IllegalSaslStateException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.errors.SaslAuthenticationException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.authenticator.SaslInternalConfigs;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredential;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramCredentialCallback;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramLoginModule;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFinalMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ClientFirstMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFinalMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.internals.ScramMessages.ServerFirstMessage;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.security.token.delegation.internals.DelegationTokenCredentialCallback;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.utils.Utils;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n\n/**\n * SaslServer implementation for SASL/SCRAM. This server is configured with a callback\n * handler for integration with a credential manager. Kafka brokers provide callbacks\n * based on a Zookeeper-based password store.\n *\n * @see <a href=\"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5802\">RFC 5802</a>\n */\npublic class ScramSaslServer implements SaslServer {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ScramSaslServer.class);\n    private static final Set<String> SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS = Utils.mkSet(ScramLoginModule.TOKEN_AUTH_CONFIG);\n\n    enum State {\n        RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE,\n        RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE,\n        COMPLETE,\n        FAILED\n    }\n\n    private final ScramMechanism mechanism;\n    private final ScramFormatter formatter;\n    private final CallbackHandler callbackHandler;\n    private State state;\n    private String username;\n    private ClientFirstMessage clientFirstMessage;\n    private ServerFirstMessage serverFirstMessage;\n    private ScramExtensions scramExtensions;\n    private ScramCredential scramCredential;\n    private String authorizationId;\n    private Long tokenExpiryTimestamp;\n\n    public ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism mechanism, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler callbackHandler) throws NoSuchAlgorithmException {\n        this.mechanism = mechanism;\n        this.formatter = new ScramFormatter(mechanism);\n        this.callbackHandler = callbackHandler;\n        setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @throws SaslAuthenticationException if the requested authorization id is not the same as username.\n     * <p>\n     * <b>Note:</b> This method may throw {@link SaslAuthenticationException} to provide custom error messages\n     * to clients. But care should be taken to avoid including any information in the exception message that\n     * should not be leaked to unauthenticated clients. It may be safer to throw {@link SaslException} in\n     * most cases so that a standard error message is returned to clients.\n     * </p>\n     */\n    @Override\n    public byte[] evaluateResponse(byte[] response) throws SaslException, SaslAuthenticationException {\n        try {\n            switch (state) {\n                case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FIRST_MESSAGE:\n                    this.clientFirstMessage = new ClientFirstMessage(response);\n                    this.scramExtensions = clientFirstMessage.extensions();\n                    if (!SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.containsAll(scramExtensions.map().keySet())) {\n                        log.debug(\"Unsupported extensions will be ignored, supported {}, provided {}\",\n                                SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS, scramExtensions.map().keySet());\n                    }\n                    String serverNonce = formatter.secureRandomString();\n                    try {\n                        String saslName = clientFirstMessage.saslName();\n                        this.username = ScramFormatter.username(saslName);\n                        NameCallback nameCallback = new NameCallback(\"username\", username);\n                        ScramCredentialCallback credentialCallback;\n                        if (scramExtensions.tokenAuthenticated()) {\n                            DelegationTokenCredentialCallback tokenCallback = new DelegationTokenCredentialCallback();\n                            credentialCallback = tokenCallback;\n                            callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, tokenCallback});\n                            if (tokenCallback.tokenOwner() == null)\n                                throw new SaslException(\"Token Authentication failed: Invalid tokenId : \" + username);\n                            this.authorizationId = tokenCallback.tokenOwner();\n                            this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = tokenCallback.tokenExpiryTimestamp();\n                        } else {\n                            credentialCallback = new ScramCredentialCallback();\n                            callbackHandler.handle(new Callback[]{nameCallback, credentialCallback});\n                            this.authorizationId = username;\n                            this.tokenExpiryTimestamp = null;\n                        }\n                        this.scramCredential = credentialCallback.scramCredential();\n                        if (scramCredential == null)\n                            throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Invalid user credentials\");\n                        String authorizationIdFromClient = clientFirstMessage.authorizationId();\n                        if (!authorizationIdFromClient.isEmpty() && !authorizationIdFromClient.equals(username))\n                            throw new SaslAuthenticationException(\"Authentication failed: Client requested an authorization id that is different from username\");\n\n                        if (scramCredential.iterations() < mechanism.minIterations())\n                            throw new SaslException(\"Iterations \" + scramCredential.iterations() +  \" is less than the minimum \" + mechanism.minIterations() + \" for \" + mechanism);\n                        this.serverFirstMessage = new ServerFirstMessage(clientFirstMessage.nonce(),\n                                serverNonce,\n                                scramCredential.salt(),\n                                scramCredential.iterations());\n                        setState(State.RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE);\n                        return serverFirstMessage.toBytes();\n                    } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\n                        throw e;\n                    } catch (Throwable e) {\n                        throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Credentials could not be obtained\", e);\n                    }\n\n                case RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE:\n                    try {\n                        ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage = new ClientFinalMessage(response);\n                        if (!clientFinalMessage.nonce().equals(serverFirstMessage.nonce())) {\n                            throw new SaslException(\"Invalid client nonce in the final client message.\");\n                        }\n                        verifyClientProof(clientFinalMessage);\n                        byte[] serverKey = scramCredential.serverKey();\n                        byte[] serverSignature = formatter.serverSignature(serverKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\n                        ServerFinalMessage serverFinalMessage = new ServerFinalMessage(null, serverSignature);\n                        clearCredentials();\n                        setState(State.COMPLETE);\n                        return serverFinalMessage.toBytes();\n                    } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\n                        throw new SaslException(\"Authentication failed: Invalid client final message\", e);\n                    }\n\n                default:\n                    throw new IllegalSaslStateException(\"Unexpected challenge in Sasl server state \" + state);\n            }\n        } catch (SaslException | AuthenticationException e) {\n            clearCredentials();\n            setState(State.FAILED);\n            throw e;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String getAuthorizationID() {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        return authorizationId;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String getMechanismName() {\n        return mechanism.mechanismName();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Object getNegotiatedProperty(String propName) {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        if (SaslInternalConfigs.CREDENTIAL_LIFETIME_MS_SASL_NEGOTIATED_PROPERTY_KEY.equals(propName))\n            return tokenExpiryTimestamp; // will be null if token not used\n        if (SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS.contains(propName))\n            return scramExtensions.map().get(propName);\n        else\n            return null;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public boolean isComplete() {\n        return state == State.COMPLETE;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public byte[] unwrap(byte[] incoming, int offset, int len) {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        throw new IllegalStateException(\"SCRAM supports neither integrity nor privacy\");\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public byte[] wrap(byte[] outgoing, int offset, int len) {\n        if (!isComplete())\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Authentication exchange has not completed\");\n        throw new IllegalStateException(\"SCRAM supports neither integrity nor privacy\");\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void dispose() {\n    }\n\n    private void setState(State state) {\n        log.debug(\"Setting SASL/{} server state to {}\", mechanism, state);\n        this.state = state;\n    }\n\n    private void verifyClientProof(ClientFinalMessage clientFinalMessage) throws SaslException {\n        try {\n            byte[] expectedStoredKey = scramCredential.storedKey();\n            byte[] clientSignature = formatter.clientSignature(expectedStoredKey, clientFirstMessage, serverFirstMessage, clientFinalMessage);\n            byte[] computedStoredKey = formatter.storedKey(clientSignature, clientFinalMessage.proof());\n            if (!MessageDigest.isEqual(computedStoredKey, expectedStoredKey))\n                throw new SaslException(\"Invalid client credentials\");\n        } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {\n            throw new SaslException(\"Sasl client verification failed\", e);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void clearCredentials() {\n        scramCredential = null;\n        clientFirstMessage = null;\n        serverFirstMessage = null;\n    }\n\n    public static class ScramSaslServerFactory implements SaslServerFactory {\n\n        @Override\n        public SaslServer createSaslServer(String mechanism, String protocol, String serverName, Map<String, ?> props, CallbackHandler cbh)\n            throws SaslException {\n\n            if (!ScramMechanism.isScram(mechanism)) {\n                throw new SaslException(String.format(\"Requested mechanism '%s' is not supported. Supported mechanisms are '%s'.\",\n                        mechanism, ScramMechanism.mechanismNames()));\n            }\n            try {\n                return new ScramSaslServer(ScramMechanism.forMechanismName(mechanism), props, cbh);\n            } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {\n                throw new SaslException(\"Hash algorithm not supported for mechanism \" + mechanism, e);\n            }\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String[] getMechanismNames(Map<String, ?> props) {\n            Collection<String> mechanisms = ScramMechanism.mechanismNames();\n            return mechanisms.toArray(new String[0]);\n        }\n    }\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/security/scram/internals/ScramSaslServer.java"
}
